## Cycle 379 вАФ 2026-06-10 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (379 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј DEEP (3 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `483-two-rooms-apart` вАФ **Resonant Room spine CYCLE 2: play a live MIDI keyboard into TWO sympathetic rooms tuned a tritone apart вАФ every note beats against a shifted copy of itself вАФ and the ONLY way to resolve the tension is to drag the two rooms back into unison yourself.** Two parallel banks of 8 high-Q biquad resonators (Room A = reference overtones, Room B = same set shifted by a continuous 0вАУ600 ¬Ґ detune, panned вИТ35¬∞/+35¬∞ L/R). At the default full tritone the rooms maximally disagree: dense beating, suspended dissonance, no tonic. A **real-time sensory-dissonance (roughness) engine** (PlompвАУLevelt / Sethares dyad model, computed analytically over all cross-room partial pairs вАФ no FFT) produces a live 0вАУ1 tension scalar that drives a Canvas2D field of two opposed particle arcs with pulsing interference arcs throbbing at the literal beat frequency |fAвИТfB|. There is **no timer, no cadence, no auto-release** вАФ the player drags the detune slider toward 0, the beating measurably slows, roughness falls, the fringes go still: resolution is an embodied act of will. This is the jury's (2026-06-10) **#1 headline ask made literal** вАФ genuine controlled dissonance the listener resolves *through action*, not a pre-baked VвАУI.

## Cycle 375 вАФ 2026-06-10 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (375 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј DEEP (3 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `471-helios-orbit` вАФ **Living Earth spine CYCLE 2: NOAA live space-weather conducts an EDM build-and-drop, seen from orbit вАФ a real geomagnetic storm IS the drop.** Watch a dark Earth from orbit while three live NOAA SWPC feeds (solar-wind plasma, IMF Bz, planetary Kp) stream in: wind speed вЖТ master brightness/tempo, density вЖТ pad shimmer, **Bz-negative вЖТ harmonic tension (drifts minor/suspended)**, **Kp вЖТ the master anticipation** (riser + quickening hi-hats build). At **Kp вЙ• 5 the DROP fires once**: sub-bass swell + 4-on-the-floor kick + the harmony **snaps minorвЖТmajor (resolves on purpose)** + the **auroral ovals ignite** around the magnetic poles (colatitude expands toward the equator, hue greensвЖТmagenta as in real storm physics) + the **magnetosphere blooms**. Then it decays back to a warm ambient bed. ## Cycle 372 вАФ 2026-06-10 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (372 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј WIDE (3 explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `460-kids-ball-pit` вАФ **the lab's FIRST many-body collision physics: tip the phone and pour ~900 glowing marbles that pile, slosh, and chime as they collide.** Gravity follows device tilt (pointer-drag fallback); every ball-ball / ball-wall impact above 60 px/s rings a soft just-intonation bell pitched by ball hue, so a cascade into a corner is a sparkling arpeggio and a gentle slosh is a few chimes. Tap to pour a fresh handful; two-finger swipe scrambles into a glittery run. - **`455-kids-sing-cymatics` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І370, removed)** вАФ VOICE вЖТ WebGL2 grain-migration cymatics, the namesake made playable: sing and ~12k grains migrate down `вИЗ|f|` onto the Chladni nodal lines of your pitch (real Faraday sorting, not a pattern render), 6 plates on a D-Dorian JI hexachord, mic analysis-only, full no-mic auto-demo. **Didn't win:** the most "Resonance-shaped" and the strongest *embodiment* (the jury's "sing not poke") вАФ but it's the only **2/5** of the three (`165-cymatics` exists вЖТ #1 not cleanly claimable; it sits on the very floor the jury said to climb off), and its central bet (child-voice pitch-detect + 12k CPU-gradient grains at 60 fps on a phone) is the least certain. **Strong bank** вАФ near-ship; the prime embodied-voice lane; de-risk by moving the grain sim to GPU transform-feedback/WebGPU compute.
- **`457-kids-pendulum-wave` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І370, removed)** вАФ pull-and-release вЖТ three.js length-graded pendulum wave: 15 glowing pendulums drift into a traveling wave and re-converge every 40 s into a **resolving descending D-major arpeggio**; pure SHM `ќЄ_k=A¬Јcos(2ѕА t/T_k)`, zero-crossing bells, self-launching (the safest hands-free read). **Didn't win:** equal ambition to the winner (**3/5**, grep-clean lab-first `pendulum.?wave`) and the most reliable visual вАФ but a pendulum wave is a *known classic* (less surprising than a singing ferrofluid) and the least embodied (mostly watch). **Strong bank** вАФ the safe, gorgeous, near-ship kids ship; or extend as a long-form/state piece (already a built-in 40-s structure).

## Cycle 367 вАФ 2026-06-09 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (367 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј DEEP (3 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `448-piano-phrase-painter` вАФ **Karel's actual recorded piano paints itself вАФ but driven by MUSICAL STRUCTURE, not raw spectrum.** It listens like a musician: spectral-flux **onset/phrase detection** + a 12-bin **chromagram вЖТ major/minor/consonance** estimate + a **dynamics envelope** decide *when* a new image is dreamed (at phrase boundaries / onset clusters, not on a fixed timer) and *what* it depicts (harmony вЖТ palette, dynamics вЖТ density, pitch-class вЖТ hue accent). The returning FAL image's average color then **bends the real piano playback back** (brightness вЖТ master lowpass + shimmer; warmth вЖТ reverb tail). The lab's first piece to **run the closed audioвЖТimageвЖТaudio loop on Karel's real recording** вАФ and the **restart of a multi-cycle spine** (#4 has been dead since cycle 414).

TECHNIQUE вАФ rhythm/percussion 3√Ч (419/423/426) + foley 1√Ч (429). VIBE вАФ kids 5√Ч (parity-exempt). Jury bans (2026-06-08, current): **mic IN ¬Ј SVG OUT ¬Ј Kuramoto TECH ¬Ј just-intonation/microtonal-tuning-as-subject TONAL-WORLD** (+ the consonant-resolving register is the deep rut, but VIBE parity is kids-exempt). `diversity: banned=[mic IN, SVG OUT, Kuramoto TECH, JI/tuning-as-subject; (kids VIBE exempt)] ¬Ј picked(433)=[touch INPUT (3√Ч, allowed) ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT (1√Ч, the decisive dodge of over-represented Canvas2D/SVG) ¬Ј Stam-fluid TECHNIQUE ¬Ј liquid-dreamy NON-percussion VIBE]` вАФ **none of the winner's tags is banned**; the WebGL2 renderer + the non-percussion liquid register are the two decisive dodges (the kids lane's own percussion rut, and the over-represented Canvas2D).

**Curation вАФ why `433` won:** all three returned clean (each builder self-reported tsc + ESLint `--max-warnings=0` exit 0; 434 also ran `next build --no-lint`; line counts 433вЙИ1105 / 434вЙИ842 / 435вЙИ1089). Both losers are real, build-reviewed demoables вЖТ folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked as resurrectable TEXT in IDEAS ¬І362 (`434` = the headphone/installation 3D-spatial piece and the explicit cycle-2 over `238-tilt-world`; `435` = the strongest *melodic* camera-kids piece, revive when the camera lane is fresh and Canvas2D isn't over-represented).

Then `rm -rf /tmp/dream-losers` (banked as IDEAS TEXT, never half-built folders). `package.json` + `package-lock.json` + `next.config.*` confirmed unchanged. Did not force the choice (jury breadth + diversity + 06:30-read governed), but it's real backing.

## Cycle 361 вАФ 2026-06-09 (UTC) ¬Ј ADULT build (361 % 2 == 1) ¬Ј WIDE (3 explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `432-three-body` вАФ **gravity composes the music**: a real-time Newtonian N-body simulation (velocity-Verlet, softened gravity) whose chaotic celestial mechanics ARE the score. Close approaches swell, slingshots whoosh, each body drones at a frequency tracking its speed вАФ deterministic but **non-repeating (Poincar√©)**, so the piece **never resolves and never loops**, the most elegant answer yet to the jury's central "make the one that doesn't harmonize" mandate.

- **`430-wiki-pulse`** (banked, IDEAS ¬І361) вАФ the **live Wikimedia recent-changes firehose** sonified (every edit on Earth, bots-vs-humans timbre split) ¬Ј external-SSE-data INPUT ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT ¬Ј event-stream-sonification TECHNIQUE ¬Ј restless-global VIBE.
- **`431-test-signal`** (banked, IDEAS ¬І361) вАФ Ikeda/Alva-Noto clinical **glitch-wall** instrument (sine-sweep + impulse-grid + bit-crush) ¬Ј keyboard/touch INPUT ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј glitch-synthesis TECHNIQUE ¬Ј clinical-abrasive VIBE.

It's also the most genuinely novel *build* (a real velocity-Verlet symplectic integrator with softened gravity, not a homage or a re-sonification) and the most "Resonance-vibe" (cosmic/transcendent) while still refusing to resolve. `430` is a superb *concept* but its core technique (real-world-data sonification) is **explicitly NOT a lab-first** (`314-solar-wind` / `337`/`418-seismic` already did it вАФ corrected in IDEAS ¬І359), so it tops out at ambition #2+#3; `431` is a strong clinical homage but refuse-to-resolve was already swung at twice recently (`357-shatter`, `422`) and it's a known genre rather than a novel build. Both losers are real, build-reviewed demoables вЖТ folders removed per the no-half-built-folders rule, banked as resurrectable TEXT in IDEAS ¬І361.

## Cycle 360 вАФ 2026-06-09 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (360 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј DEEP (3 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `429-kids-texture-paint-tap` вАФ the lab's **first pure-NOISE/foley kids instrument played by TOUCH**: a finger-paint where each brush's TEXTURE *is* its sound (crunch / pop / tap / scratch / splash), rendered as procedural impulse+resonator foley with **zero pitch, zero scale, zero melody** вАФ the **adult-jury's #1 mandate ("rhythm/timbre/NOISE, not tuning") finally answered for kids via a non-camera, non-mic route**

**Git sync / env:** `git fetch` showed local `main` **force-diverged again** (the recurring orphan history at cycle 305) вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` to HEAD `f1d422f` (cycle-359 `426-euclid-engine`). **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`): the loved set is **heavily paint/draw + physics + tactile** for kids вАФ `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вЭ§пЄП, `158-kids-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `160-kids-paint-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `152-kids-star-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `153-paint-compose`вЭ§пЄП, `223-fourier-paint`вЭ§пЄП, plus `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП / `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП / `140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП / `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП. This fire genuinely rides that signal: a **finger-paint** toy (the most-loved kids lineage) given a fresh NOISE/timbre twist. The loves didn't force the pick (jury + diversity gates governed) but are real additive support, cited per the love-aware rule.

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І360, today, web tools healthy):** 15-min dive across cs.GR/cs.SD-adjacent + creative-coding + kids-HCI + procedural-audio. The dive's real value was a pair of **prior-art kills via grep** (the ¬І357/¬І359 discipline): my first DEEP concept вАФ a *squishy soft-body jelly drum* вАФ collapsed because **soft-body/Verlet/mass-spring + modal-membrane physical-modeling are SATURATED** (`286-kids-jelly-choir` is literally squish-a-blob-it-sings; `284-kids-thunder-drum` + `202-membrane-drum` are modal membranes; `303-kids-wind-harp` is Verlet+Karplus). A pivot to *Markov/generative-rhythm-for-kids* ALSO died on grep (`209-kids-drum-tap` is a 1st-order Markov drum toy; `213`/`154` are call-and-response). Even *weatherвЖТmusic* is taken (`293-kids-sky-band`, `115-kids-weather-music`, `306-kids-rain-shaker`) вАФ **but every weather/instrument kids piece maps to PENTATONIC PITCH; not one is pure NOISE/foley.** That gap = the hook. Web anchors (current): real-time browser procedural-foley is converging on **Perlin-noise + granular for rain/wind/fire** (PANO multichannel foley synth; UE5 MetaSounds 2026; arXiv:2606.00629 *Quality Audio Prototyping*, June 2026 вАФ unified retrieval + procedural generation, <30d but **not** claimed as #5 since it doesn't directly drive the build). Chain visible: ¬І360 dive вЖТ "every kids sound toy plays NOTES; build the one whose whole palette is NOISE/TEXTURE вАФ the jury's #1, by touch, breaking the camera streak."

**Decide вАФ gates:**
- **Rotation:** 360 % 2 = 0 вЖТ **kids** (VIBE parity-exempt). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70%.
- **JURY-directed (2026-06-08 verdict, still current):** bans **mic INPUT ¬Ј SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј Kuramoto TECHNIQUE ¬Ј just-intonation/microtonal-tuning-as-subject TONAL-WORLD**. Loudest still-open = **#1** (subject = rhythm/timbre/**NOISE**, NOT tuning). Answered for kids only via **camera** so far (`419` poseвЖТbeat, `423` faceвЖТbeat). This fire answers #1's **NOISE** branch вАФ the literal word the jury used вАФ via **touch**, a genuinely different route that **rests the camera** (used in the two prior kids ships, diversity).
- **Mode: DEEP** вАФ alternates correctly off cycle 359's WIDE (WвЖТD). ONE concept (*finger-paint where the brush's TEXTURE is its SOUND вАФ noise, never notes*), **3 synthesis approaches**: 427 GRANULAR-noise foley (Canvas2D) / 428 SUBTRACTIVE noise-morph (raw WebGL2) / 429 IMPULSE+RESONATOR foley events (Canvas2D). JURY names no kids thread to extend вЖТ DEEP opens a coherent new pure-noise/timbre thread with 3 attacks.
- **Ambition floor вАФ winner `429` clears 2/5** (need 2; stated plainly, no stretch): `ambition: #2 вЙ•3-subsystems (impulse+resonator foley synth engine [5 noise-excitation voices through randomized inharmonic biquad resonators + per-voice cooldown + limiter] + always-on noise ambient bed + Canvas2D textured-stamp renderer + pointer/auto-demo input = 4) + #3 named-reference (Wolfgang K√ґhler bouba/kiki sound-symbolism 1929 ¬Ј Andy Farnell *Designing Sound* 2010 procedural foley ¬Ј Perry Cook PhISM)`. **#1 honestly NOT claimed** вАФ granular/noise/modal synth all exist in the lab; the *fresh* move is the **all-noise-no-pitch FRAMING + textureвЖФtimbre cross-modal mapping for kids**, not a new synthesis primitive. **#5 NOT claimed** вАФ the June-2026 anchor is real but supporting context, not the technique driver.
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped: 426/423/422/419/418/417/414/413/410/408): over-represented вЖТ **mic INPUT 4√Ч** (414/413/410/408) BANNED-by-count; **camera INPUT** (423/419) RESTED for breadth (would be 3 kids-camera in a row); jury bans **SVG OUT / Kuramoto / JI-as-subject**. Canvas2D = 3√Ч (NOT вЙ•4 вЖТ allowed). `diversity: banned=[mic IN (4√Ч), SVG OUT, Kuramoto TECH, JI/tuning-as-subject; camera IN rested] ¬Ј picked(429)=[touch INPUT ¬Ј Canvas2D OUTPUT (3√Ч, allowed) ¬Ј impulse-resonator NOISE-foley TECHNIQUE ¬Ј kids non-tuned texture VIBE]` вАФ **none of the winner's tags is banned.** Touch INPUT is the clean dodge of the over-represented mic; the **all-noise/zero-tuning VIBE is the literal answer to the consonance rut.** *Forward note:* Canvas2D now tips to 4√Ч in the trailing window вЖТ WebGL2/three.js are the cleaner renderer lanes for the next 1вАУ2 cycles (the banked `428` is already WebGL2).

**Orchestration (DEEP) вАФ 3 folder-isolated Builders (general-purpose/sonnet), pre-allocated 427/428/429, spawned concurrently in one message,** each fully self-contained (own folder, no git, no shared-doc access, no cross-imports, no API route), each handed the KIDS rules + typography + limiter/auto-demo/iOS-gesture constraints verbatim. I **waited for all 3 completion notifications before any `mv`** (the recurring race lesson) and curated from the **ACTUAL code + READMEs + the authoritative build** вАФ grep-verified each is real (427: look-ahead grain scheduler + filtered-noise grains, 0 oscillators, 903 lines; 428: 3 WebGL2 shader programs + ping-pong FBO accumulation + subtractive noise engine, 1279 lines; 429: 5 noise-excitation foley voices through randomized inharmonic resonators + cooldowns, 0 oscillators, Canvas2D stamp renderer, 1029 lines).
- **`429-kids-texture-paint-tap` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ see INDEX/README. **Won** on: (a) **purest concept** вАФ 0 oscillators, genuinely pitch-less; its 5 voices (crunch/pop/tap/scratch/splash) are the most *recognizable real-world* foley, so the cross-modal sound-symbolism point lands hardest for a 4-year-old and reads instantly at 06:30 ("oh вАФ it's crunchy!"); (b) **most kid-legible** вАФ discrete one-dab-one-satisfying-sound causeвЖТeffect (the exact legibility logic that won `419` and `423` over their continuous siblings), vs. 427/428's continuous morph which a toddler connects to more slowly; (c) **safest build** вАФ Canvas2D + per-voice cooldown + brick-wall limiter, no GL/FBO perf risk on low-end tablets. Touch INPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, pure-noise foley, multi-touch via pointer-capture, auto-demo (1.8s, loops all 5 brushes), tap-to-start (iOS AudioContext-in-gesture), full teardown, typography-compliant (I bumped two opacity values to meet the contrast rules: active-brush desc /50вЖТ/80, design-notes link /30вЖТ/55). **No build fix needed** (authoritative build exit 0 first try).
- **`428-kids-texture-paint-morph` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І360, removed)** вАФ subtractive noise-morph, **raw WebGL2** painterly accumulation (ping-pong FBO, fbm/ripple/grain/fire/sparkle shaders). The **most beautiful** candidate (a glowing accreting paint canvas вАФ the strongest pull on Karel's loved-paint lineage) and the cleaner renderer-diversity lane (WebGL2 1√Ч recent vs Canvas2D 3√Ч). **Didn't win:** continuous morph is less kid-legible than discrete events, it uses 3 sub-audible LFO oscillators (marginally less "pure noise" for a concept whose thesis is zero-pitch), and the 3-program FBO pipeline is the highest perf/build risk on low-end phones. **The obvious cycle-2 visual deepening** (port 429's discrete foley voices onto 428's WebGL2 painterly canvas).
- **`427-kids-texture-paint-grains` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І360, removed)** вАФ granular-noise foley (look-ahead grain scheduler; drag speedвЖТdensity/size/brightness), Canvas2D. Real, single-file, 0 oscillators. **Didn't win:** solid but not the standout on any axis вАФ granular continuous like 428 but less visually rich, Canvas2D like 429 but less legible than discrete events. The reference granular-texture take.

Anchor: **"Expotion: Facial Expression and Motion Control for Multimodal Music Generation" (arXiv:2507.04955, 2025)** вАФ face+motion as controls for a music-gen model; the SOTA validation that *the face is a legitimate musical controller*. **Surprising finding (the dive's real output):** the *current* (June 2026) faceвЖФaudio research front is almost entirely the **inverse** вАФ audioвЖТ**talking-face** avatars (UMo 2605.14731, LiveGesture 2604.10927, the talking-face-arxiv-daily repo); the **forward** direction (face вЖТ music as a *played* instrument) peaked with Expotion (2025) and went quiet. That gap = the prototype hook: a **low-latency in-browser faceвЖТsound toy where expressions ARE the performance** вАФ and for kids, mapping to **percussion not pitch** also breaks the tuning rut. **Prior-art grep:** MediaPipe FaceLandmarker already shipped in `258-kids-mirror-pets` (faceвЖТpentatonic PITCH) вАФ so face-tracking is **not** a lab-first; the fresh move is faceвЖТ**rhythm** (exact analogue of `419`'s bodyвЖТbeat). Chain visible: ¬І358 dive вЖТ "make a BEAT with your face, not a tune" вЖТ DEEP-3 fire вЖТ shipped 423.

## Cycle 354 вАФ 2026-06-08 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (354 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј DEEP (3 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `417-kids-cradle-song` вАФ the lab's **first BIDIRECTIONAL sensorimotor-entrainment** piece (music that locks to your rocking *and gently leads your tempo down to sleep*) and its **2nd truly off-screen / audio-first** piece вАФ the DEEP off-screen cycle the jury explicitly asked for

**Git sync / env:** `git fetch` showed local `main` had **force-diverged** (local 50 / origin 50, **no merge-base** вАФ a detached/orphan history at cycle 305) вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` to cycle-353 HEAD `61137d8` (`414-conchordal-listen`). No single love forced the pick (kids parity + JURY #5 + the gates governed) вАФ but a **calm, embodied, eyes-closed lullaby** sits squarely in the loved calm-grow + tilt-embodied families; soft support for the audio-only winner.

**Research-first dive (RESEARCH ¬І354, today, web tools healthy):** 15-min dive targeting the JURY's most-unmoved critique (#5, the **off-screen/embodiment gap** вАФ "still only ONE truly off-screen piece"). Spatial-audio searches (weskill 2026-03 immersive-soundscapes; arXiv:2603.24104 / 2603.16668 Mar-2026 HRTF) came back **well-trodden, not lab-first** (grep shows HRTF/PannerNode in `346/400/394/42/29/308`). Pivoted to the **sensorimotor-synchronization / gait-entrainment** corpus (D-Jogger, Moens/Leman ~2014; interactive-RAS, Hove 2012; Repp 2005; ADAM, 2013; Large & Jones 1999). **The reframe:** the lab's movement piece `402-kids-steady-walk` only *analyzes* your beat one-way вАФ the lab-first move is **bidirectional** (the music a coupled oscillator that locks AND *leads*). Chain visible: ¬І354 dive вЖТ "make a music that holds the child's hand to sleep" вЖТ DEEP-3 off-screen entrainment fire.

**Decide вАФ gates:**
- **Rotation:** 354 % 2 = 0 вЖТ **kids**. No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70%.
- **JURY-directed (Decide priority вАФ categorical-menu/off-screen):** JURY 2026-06-07 #5 names the off-screen gap as the one metric that **hasn't moved** and explicitly says *"spend a DEEP cycle on the categorical menu's untouched shelf вАФ non-screen / spatial-audio / haptic вА¶ the lab keeps researching embodiment and never building it."* This fire is exactly that. Also crosses #6 (a kids piece that isn't the emergence-sim reflex).
- **Mode: DEEP** вАФ one concept (*music that locks to your movement and leads your tempo*), **3 engine/direction attacks** (audio-only Kuramoto lullaby / DOM-CSS adaptive-oscillator wind-down / DOM-CSS ADAM-correction wake-up). DEEP is **jury-mandated** for this shelf (the alternation note yields to the explicit #5 directive).
- **Ambition floor вАФ winner `417` clears 4/5** (need 2): `ambition: #1 never-used-technique (BIDIRECTIONAL humanвЖФmusic entrainment вАФ a music oscillator that LEADS the listener's tempo via Kuramoto coupling + drifting natural frequency вАФ grep-verified lab-first: 402 analyzes one-way only, 384's Kuramoto is organismвЖФorganism) + #2 вЙ•3-subsystems (gravity-tilt rock detector + Kuramoto entrainment engine + additive formant hum-voice synth + drone/reverb/sway = вЙ•4) + #3 named-reference (Kuramoto 1975 ¬Ј D-Jogger Moens/Leman ~2014 ¬Ј interactive-RAS Hove 2012 ¬Ј Repp 2005 ¬Ј Oliveros Deep Listening 2005) + #4 multi-cycle-commitment (cycle 1 of a new bidirectional-entrainment thread вАФ cycle 2 = the ¬І354 DOM-CSS visible leads; cycle 3 = Karel's Welcome Home as the entrainment bed)`. **#5 honestly NOT claimed** вАФ the entrainment corpus is foundational (2005вАУ2014); the dive's only <90d hits were spatial-audio pieces the build doesn't use (honest, per the jury's #4 anti-apology directive вАФ I'm stating it plainly, not leaning on a stretch).
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped: 414/413/410/408/404/402/400/397/394/391): **SVG OVER-REPRESENTED вЙ•4√Ч** (414/413/410/402/391 = 5√Ч) вЖТ **BANNED this cycle** by the audit rule (the STATE ¬І353 warning "SVG warming ~3√Ч, banned if it hits 4√Ч" has now fired); plus the carried Canvas2D over-rep and the standing JURY 2026-06-07 bans (raw-WebGL2, three.js, MIDI/keyboard, touch/tap, D-Dorian). `diversity: banned=[SVG(over-rep вЙ•4√Ч), Canvas2D(carried over-rep), raw-WebGL2, three.js, MIDI/keyboard, touch/tap, D-Dorian] ¬Ј picked(417)=[device-motion/rocking INPUT ¬Ј audio-only/off-screen OUTPUT ¬Ј bidirectional Kuramoto-entrainment TECHNIQUE ¬Ј whole-tone/JI calm VIBE]` вАФ **none of the winner's tags is banned.** The audio-only render is the decisive dodge: with SVG + Canvas2D + WebGL2 + three.js all banned, an off-screen/audio-only piece is the cleanest possible diversity move AND the jury's #5 ask, simultaneously.

**Orchestration:** 3 folder-isolated Builders (general-purpose/sonnet) вАФ 415 DOM-CSS moon wind-down / 416 DOM-CSS parade wake-up / 417 audio-only Kuramoto lullaby вАФ spawned concurrently in one message, each fully self-contained (own folder, no git, no shared-doc access, no cross-imports, no API route). I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified from the ACTUAL code + READMEs + the authoritative build, not self-reports вАФ read all three `entrain.ts` in full (415 = genuine Large & Jones phase+period adaptive oscillator with preferred-period drift; 416 = real ADAM ќ±-phase/ќ≤-period linear correction in ms-space with a moving target leading *up*; 417 = a true Kuramoto `dќЄ/dt = ѕЙ(t)+K¬Јsin(ќЄ_rockвИТќЄ_music)` with ѕЙ drifting 65вЖТ45 cpm) and read `417/page.tsx` end-to-end (rich additive formant hum + drone + ConvolverNode reverb + StereoPanner sway + DynamicsCompressor limiter; DeviceMotion-inside-tap + iOS `requestPermission` + AudioContext-inside-tap; drag fallback + 2.5 s auto-demo feeding the same Kuramoto step; clean unmount teardown вАФ not a stub).
- **`417-kids-cradle-song` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ see INDEX/README. **Won** on: the **truest answer to the jury's single most-unmoved critique** (#5 off-screen вАФ it's the lab's 2nd truly audio-first piece and goes *further* off-screen than `346`, which still has a compass; this one is near-black + one breathing dot), the **boldest "massively bigger" swing** (an eyes-closed, screen-dark kids lullaby is rare in 200+ kids prototypes), the cleanest **diversity** dodge (audio-only sidesteps every banned renderer at once), a **genuine** Kuramoto engine + rich formant-hum synth, and the best **hands-free 06:30 fit** (2.5 s auto-demo plays the full hum-and-lead-to-sleep arc untouched). audio-only DOM, no API route, typography-compliant, graceful `text-rose-300` motion-denied fallback. **No fix needed** (clean build first try вАФ 417's builder had already run `next build`).
- **`415-kids-rock-the-moon` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І354, removed)** вАФ DOM/CSS breathing-moon wind-down, **Large & Jones adaptive oscillator**, JI-major. The strongest *legible visual* of the wind-down. **Didn't win:** keeps a screen front-and-centre, and #5 (off-screen) was the louder unmet need this fire; also a tuning caveat (its INITвЖТFINAL period currently *speeds up*, needs inverting/retuning). Strong cycle-2 "watch-it" companion.

## Cycle 352 вАФ 2026-06-08 (UTC) ¬Ј KIDS build (352 % 2 == 0) ¬Ј DEEP (3 renderers) ¬Ј SHIPS `413-kids-mouth-mirror` вАФ the lab's **first ARTICULATORY-INVERSION toy** and its **first real LPC formant tracking**: a child sings a vowel and *sees inside the mouth* (a side-view cartoon tongue/jaw glides to the shape it heard), then the head sings it back in whole-tone

**Git sync / env:** `git fetch` showed origin/main **force-updated** (local main had diverged: 50/50 commits) вЖТ `git reset --hard origin/main` to the cycle-351 HEAD `1e24329` (`410-conchordal-garden`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` was **MISSING** вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0, from existing lockfile). A builder's `npm install` touched `package-lock.json` вЖТ **`git checkout -- package-lock.json`** before the authoritative build (lockfiles are never committed вАФ absolute rule). Max committed folder on disk = 410 вЖТ pre-allocated **411/412/413** to the three builders (collision-free).

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`): loved set skews kids + voice/embodied + spectral. No single love forced the pick вАФ but a *kids voice toy that shows what it heard* sits in the loved kids-voice lineage (`158-hum-paint`вЭ§пЄП, `100-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП, the vowel/mirror-choir family). Soft support, the JURY directive + kids parity + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Research dive (mandatory, RESEARCH ¬І352):** targeted JURY #6 (a *kids listening/analysis toy*). Surfaced вАФ and **sharpened** вАФ **AURORA formant-to-tongue inversion (arXiv:2603.17543, Mar 2026)**: maps a sung vowel's formants to a *predicted tongue/articulator shape*. The lab's recent `393-kids-vowel-color` cited AURORA but took the proxy to be a flat **screen color** and used crude **FFT peak-picking**, whose own README concedes it is **unreliable precisely for children's high voices** and that **LPC/cepstral** is the real fix. The dive's value: it turned an existing reference into a genuinely lab-first build (real **LPC/cepstral formant tracking + articulatory inversion**, done *literally* вАФ you see the tongue, not a color). **#5 honestly NOT claimed** (AURORA ~3 months old + already name-dropped by 393); floor cleared by #1+#2+#3.

**Decide (gates):**
- **Rotation:** 352 % 2 = 0 вЖТ **kids** (AGENT decide-step). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70%.
- **JURY (2026-06-07) directed pick:** provocation **#6** ("a *kids* listening/analysis toy вАФ a child sings, the machine shows what it heard вАФ would break both macro-ruts in one fire") + #1 (force off the WebGL2 rut вЖТ non-GPU renderer) + #2 (foreign tonal, not D-Dorian). This fire does all three.
- **Mode: DEEP** вАФ one ambitious concept (*a creature that physically copies your mouth from a sung vowel and sings it back*), **3 technical attacks** (LPCвЖТSVG front creature/JI ¬Ј cepstralвЖТCanvas2D puppet/slendro ¬Ј LPCвЖТSVG side-view x-ray tongue/whole-tone). - **`397-kids-crystal-bloom` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ mic-loudness вЖТ SVG crystal tower in **just intonation** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1, 9/4, 5/2 over A2вЙИ110 Hz); additive sine-partial bells, fast attack + long shimmer tail, sustained f0+3/2 drone, soft-clip+compressor limiter (kids-safe). **Won** because it most directly answers the jury's *sharpest* critique simultaneously: a foreign tonal world (#2) that is also the freshest research anchor (#5 вАФ the expensive criterion the jury said is nearly always skipped), a rare renderer (#1, SVG), and the under-served calm/breath/eyes-leaning niche вАФ the cleanest `today's research вЖТ today's build` chain of the three. - **Honest caveat on the winner (carried to its README):** FFT peak-picking formant detection is approximate and *least* reliable on high children's voices (wide harmonic spacing; /i/ vs /u/ confusable) вАФ which is the literal target user. Mitigated by the no-wrong design (every sound still drives field brightness/glow via RMS, so the toy always responds) and by "aaah vs ooo" being the most child-accessible + most reliably separated pair. The 394 brightness-fallback (above) is the real fix and the obvious next-cycle deepening.

- **`387-drop-engine` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ generative EDM build-and-drop arc; internal arc state-machine; **club VIBE**. **Won** on three axes: (a) **biggest concept + most on-Karel-priority** вАФ it's an *alternate journey engine*, the explicit priority-#4 want the lab had never built, and a "massively bigger" jump than a fresh combination; (b) **maximal diversity gain** вАФ the lab's first energetic/club vibe, the cleanest break from the "too similar" adult monoculture (drones + analysis); (c) **legible in a new register** вАФ the single tension scalar makes the *form/energy* arc legible in both sound and picture (the jury's "feed the legible lane," applied to form instead of harmony). Verified from code: `page.tsx` read end-to-end (clean rAF/AudioContext/scheduler cleanup on unmount, `runFrame` helper not `use*`-named, WebGL2 fallback wired, typography-compliant, AudioContext created in the Start tap), `arc.ts`/`synth.ts`/`scheduler.ts`/`viz.ts` present; safety grep clean (no api route, no `guard` needed, no mic/camera/network/secrets, no `use*` helpers).
- **`386-aeolian-atlas` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І341, folder `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ live global wind (Open-Meteo, client-side, baked fallback) вЖТ **Strouhal aeolian-tone** synthesis вЖТ Canvas2D wind atlas; **cosmic/data VIBE**. Build-reviewed clean. **Didn't win**: leans **ambient pad-chorus**, the exact adult lane the jury said to *starve* вАФ strong, but lower surprise than a new club engine. Strongest data-sonification revive; fix-first = verify Open-Meteo batched array-response shape live (builder flagged the array-vs-object ambiguity вЖТ fallback silently activates if wrong).
- **`388-flow-grains` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І341, folder `rm -rf`'d)** вАФ webcam **optical-flow** field вЖТ **granular** cloud (analysis-only camera, no-camera auto-demo); **embodied/organic VIBE**. Strong second-off-couch revive; fix-first = tune flow thresholds on a real dim-room camera + consider a WebGL2 viz port (768 radial-gradients/frame on Canvas2D unverified on mobile).

**Validate**: copied 386/388 to `/tmp/dream-losers` (fallback retention), `rm -rf` their folders, ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **ONLY `387` present** вЖТ **вЬУ Compiled successfully in 38.9s**, `/dream/387-drop-engine вЧЛ (Static) 8.33 kB / 111 kB First Load` in the route manifest, **zero warnings/errors attributable to 387** (all remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance app code). **No fix attempts needed.** `package-lock.json` confirmed unchanged + excluded from the commit. Scope clean: only `src/app/dream/387-drop-engine/` + `docs/dreams/**` touched. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU in this sandbox).

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вАФ Web Audio + WebGL2, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no network, no recording/upload, no secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only). One commit, prefix `dream: cycle 341:`.

Unverified surface: (a) the **onset detector thresholds/weights** on a real mic вАФ spectral-flux normalisation, adaptive-mean follow, threshold mult/floor, HFC band and refractory are reasoned, not measured; on real hardware they may run too hot (drone/room noise self-triggering) or too deaf (soft kid claps missed) вАФ the defaults lean forgiving; (b) **drone-vs-mic self-noise** (the mic shares the analyser with the synthetic tap-bus + drone; the HFC weighting is *meant* to keep the steady drone below threshold, unverified under real mic AGC); (c) the **¬±0.34 s / ~60% match tolerance** вАФ whether a wobbly 4-year-old's clap-back reliably reads as a "match" and grows, vs. stalling; (d) **auto-demo overlap** вАФ a real mic clap can't cancel the running demo (only a screen tap reliably does), a mild real-device edge; (e) WebGL2 creature/bead `gl_PointSize` + smile-arc shader math compiled but never rendered. The hands-free auto-demo is the safety net so a denied/slow mic never blocks the demo at 06:30.
- **Jury alignment**: answers the kids critique directly вАФ gives the lane the **memory/consequence** `350` lacked (growing shared rhythm), holds the **D-Dorian / anti-pentatonic** line, and moves the *experience* (the phone genuinely listens to your hands) rather than relabeling a poke-toy. The WIDE-3 orchestration is the portfolio choreography (planner sets 3 diverse briefs вЖТ 3 parallel makers вЖТ critic reads the actual code + runs the authoritative build вЖТ curator ships one validated winner + banks two build-verified ready-to-ship seeds).

## Cycle 335 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (3 legibility approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `370-tonal-map` вАФ the **deepening of the Spiral-Array thread** the JURY keeps demanding, finally shipped, and shipped *fixed for legibility*. Implements **Elaine Chew's Spiral Array** (MIT, 2000) tonal model вАФ the music's **center of effect** (weighted centroid of sounding pitch-class points) вАФ but renders it as a **top-down, labeled circle-of-fifths MAP** so the abstract 3-D helix that sank `364-tonal-orbit` becomes a readable map you navigate: a bright **comet of tonal gravity** glides across named key territories, a **modulation is literally the comet crossing from the "C" disc to the "G" disc**, and a fading **trail** shows where it's been. The surprising legibility move (straight from today's research): the **tonal-focus** scalar вАФ how concentrated recent pitch content is around the center of gravity (arXiv:2603.27035, gravitational centering) вАФ drives the comet's **halo radius**, so you *see* focus tighten in-key and **bloom wide the instant a modulation begins**, not just read a number. Internal demo auto-plays a deliberately dramatic modulating journey (CвЖТGвЖТDвЖТEmвЖТC) so the comet visibly tours the map at the 06:30 phone review; **Web MIDI** feeds a pianist's own playing into the identical pipeline. HUD: key / chord / Roman numeral / modulation banner / tonal-focus meter + a teaching legend.

**Decide gates (all cleared):**
- **Rotation:** 335 % 2 = 1 вЖТ **adult** (kids resumes 336). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (368 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY + STATE-directed pick (the deepen):** JURY 2026-06-06's loudest meta-complaint is *"Actually deepen something. No multi-cycle thread advanced this window despite two being queued repeatedlyвА¶ ship the deepening instead of deferring it for a fourth fresh WIDE explorer. The lab keeps promising depth and buying breadth."* STATE ¬І334/¬І333 explicitly queued cycle 335 = **deepen `364-tonal-orbit` (Chew Spiral Array)**, the build-clean banked thread. I took it. (Considered the JURY's other named deepen, **Mirror-Canon cycle-2 RoundвЗДPhase** вАФ REJECTED: `302-mirror-canon-round`'s README *already documents a Phase mode*, and folding cycle-2 "into 302" would require editing an existing prototype = **immutability violation**; a standalone clone would be a near-duplicate of 302. - **Research-first вЖТ build chain:** RESEARCH ¬І335 (today) вАФ **arXiv:2603.27035 "Diachronic Modeling of Tonal Coherence on the Tonnetz"** (March 2026, code on GitHub) models tonal motion as **gravitational centering on the line-of-fifths** with a **tonal-focus** scalar that *underestimates focus during modulation* (secondary-key content shows displaced from the tonic). ## Cycle 334 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 play-models of ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `368-kids-rainbow-quest` вАФ the lab's **first color-foraging *game***: a friendly unicorn shows a glowing color and *wants* it, so a 4-year-old goes and **points the phone camera at something that color in the real world** (red, then orange, then yellowвА¶). Getting close makes the creature **glow warmer** with a rising musical shimmer; holding the match ~0.6s triggers a **fanfare + sparkle burst** and fills a **rainbow arc** across the top; collect all seven вЖТ the arc plays a **rainbow song** and loops with a fresh shuffle. No reading, no timer, no score, no fail вАФ and crucially it gets the child *off the couch into their room* (the most direct answer yet to the JURY's "stop staring at the screen"). ColorвЖТpitch is the most legible kids mapping (KIDS.md: "color is the language"); each hue вЖТ a note in **D-Dorian** (NOT C-pentatonic) over an always-on D+A drone; **camera is analysis-only** (no recording, no upload, no network). Plays itself hands-free via auto-demo at the 06:30 review when there's no camera.

**Decide gates (all cleared):**
- **Rotation:** cycle 334 is even вЖТ **kids-focused** (AGENT.md kid-cycle rotation; STATE ¬І333 explicitly queued 334 as kids). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (365 shipped demoable last fire).
- **Research-first вЖТ build chain:** RESEARCH ¬І334 (today) вАФ camera-as-controller is commodity in-browser (Google **"Jump to Play: Building with Gemini & MediaPipe"**, 2026-03-24; Bolt √Ч MediaPipe templates) but a lab grep shows camera motion/shadow/optical-flow/pigment are all done (`221`/`268`/`287`/`295`/`271`/`101`вЭ§пЄП/`110`) вАФ the empty shelf is a **color-foraging *game***. - **Diversity audit (vs last 10 = 365,360,358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341):** OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 **4√Ч** (360,347,345,341) вЖТ **BANNED**; three.js 1√Ч, DOM/CSS 2√Ч, Canvas2D 0√Ч, SVG 1√Ч, HRTF/audio-only 1√Ч. Winner uses NONE of the banned tags.
- **Mode:** `mode: DEEP` вАФ ONE concept (*"Color Hunt: point the camera at real-world colors, each sings in D-Dorian"*) attacked via 3 distinct **play-models √Ч renderers**: center-swatch+memory (three.js) / whole-frame palette-chord (Canvas2D) / find-this-color quest (DOM/CSS). Alternates off cycle 332's WIDE (AGENT: *don't run WIDE every night*); chosen because I had ONE big concept worth exploring deeply rather than three unrelated darts, and it matches Karel's "massively bigger concepts" push.
- **Loves bias:** leaned on the **camera** love-cluster вАФ `101-camera-song`вЭ§пЄП + `86-sound-to-video`вЭ§пЄП (camera as instrument) вАФ plus the kids color/tactile cluster (`82-kids-color-piano`вЭ§пЄП, `317-kids-color-bells`вЭ§пЄП). Camera was the loved-and-fresh axis that also dodged every ban.

**Orchestration (DEEP, 3 folder-isolated builders, parallel; pre-allocated 366/367/368, sonnet):**
- **`368-kids-rainbow-quest` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ find-this-color guided quest, DOM/CSS. **Won** on the **kids bar**: the **clearest 4yo goal** ("the unicorn wants red вАФ go find red!" needs zero reading and is grasped in one second, where 366's free-forage and 367's ambient sweep have no discrete goal); **most embodied** (sends the child into the physical world вАФ best answer to the screen-bias provocation); **best payoff loop** (warmerвЖТfanfareвЖТrainbow arcвЖТrainbow song); and **lowest perf risk** (DOM/CSS vs 366's per-particle three.js PointLights). page.tsx (864) + audio.ts (244) + colors.ts (204) + README. Authoritative `npm run build` вЬУ exit 0 (`вЬУ Compiled successfully in 36.4s`; `/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest` 6.03 kB route / 109 kB First Load вАФ light DOM/CSS, no GPU bundle).
- **`366-kids-color-hunt` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І334, moved to /tmp)** вАФ free-forage jam, three.js; hueвЖТdegree/brightnessвЖТoctave, hold-to-catch, and every 3 catches **the colors you caught replay as the melody you built**. The **strongest deepening** (melody/composition memory вАФ the "gift from past self") but lost on **no clear 4yo goal in the first 5s** + **three.js per-particle PointLight** perf risk. Flagged as the next-kids resurrection (fix: cheaper glow + a soft suggested-color hint), or fold its memory-replay into 368.
- **`367-kids-color-chord` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І334, moved to /tmp)** вАФ whole-frame **palette вЖТ 4-note chord**, Canvas2D; colorful room = rich chord, plain wall = one soft tone. The **most surprising** take (adults would enjoy it) but **ambient with no discrete payoff** вЖТ reads older than 4. Resurrect as an adult/older-kid piece.

## Cycle 333 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (3 technical approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `365-cadence-ladder` вАФ a real-time **tonal/functional harmonic analyst**: it names the KEY you're in, the Roman-numeral FUNCTION of every chord, and makes the *pull-and-resolve of harmony visible* as a three.js tension ladder (Tonic at rest on the bottom ¬Ј Subdominant departing in the middle ¬Ј Dominant pulling at the top). Each chord drops into its functional zone as a glowing block; **cadences flash named resolving arcs** вАФ VвЖТI *authentic* (emerald), IVвЖТI *plagal/"amen"* (violet), VвЖТvi *deceptive* (amber); when the music **modulates** a ripple sweeps the scene and every Roman numeral re-contextualises (the same chord changes function as the key shifts). The lab's **first key-estimation + functional/cadence analysis** (grep-verified вАФ `229-chord-canvas` names chords but does NO key, NO Roman numerals, NO cadence/function). Proves itself 358-style: an internally-authored progression (C major with authentic/deceptive/plagal cadences вЖТ modulates to G major) is **known ground truth**, so the analyzer is watched proving itself on a phone with no hardware; **Web MIDI** lets a pianist play their own chords into the identical pipeline. Auto-plays on Begin; alive in ~10 s at the 06:30 review.

**Decide gates (all cleared):**
- **Rotation:** 333 % 2 = 1 вЖТ **adult** (kids resumes 334). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (360 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY-directed pick:** JURY 2026-06-06's loudest adult provocation is *"feed the legible/instructional lane вАФ build the obvious next one: a real-time score-follower or a **chord/key analyzer that names the harmony you play**"* (its named wins were the legible 358/353/345) AND *"starve the adult JI-drone monoculture."* I took the analyzer, deepened past mere chord-naming (already in lab at 229) into **key-finding + functional/cadence analysis** вАФ the instructional lane the jury asked to feed. (Deliberately did NOT take the jury's other option, deepening Mirror-Canon cycle-2; banked the Spiral-Array runner-up as the multi-cycle thread to deepen instead вАФ noted below.)
- **Research-first вЖТ build chain:** RESEARCH ¬І333 (today) вАФ Krumhansl-Schmuckler key-finding is commodity in standalone tools (wutools, Meyda-based browser detectors, arXiv 2505.17259 "Audio Key Detection," May 2025) but **grep-clean in this lab**; the empty shelf is *functional* analysis (key + Roman numeral + cadence), not chord-naming. Build implements that hook directly. Chain visible.
- **Ambition floor (4/5):** `ambition: #1 never-used-technique (Krumhansl-Schmuckler key estimation + Roman-numeral functional labeling + cadence detection + modulation tracking вАФ grep-verified lab-first; 229 does chord-NAME only) + #2 вЙ•3 subsystems (decaying pitch-class profile + K-S key estimator w/ hysteresis + chord-quality template matcher + Riemann functional/cadence mapper + three.js ladder render + Web-Audio synth = 6) + #3 named reference (Krumhansl & Kessler 1982 probe-tone profiles ¬Ј Temperley 2001 ¬Ј Riemann 1893 functional harmony ¬Ј Aldwell & Schachter cadence tradition) + #5 recent-research (RESEARCH ¬І333 today)`.
- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 shipped = 360,358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337):** OUTPUT вАФ raw-WebGL2 4√Ч (360,347,345,341 вЖТ WARM/avoid), DOM/CSS 3√Ч (355,353,346), three.js 2√Ч (358,337 вАФ safe), SVG 1√Ч (350, jury-banned separately). INPUT вАФ touch & mic/voice jury-BANNED; tilt/seed/clock/keyboard/external spread thin. `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT ¬Ј inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј adult-JI-drone VIBE] + (self) raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (warm 4√Ч)] ¬Ј picked=[MIDI/internal-demo INPUT (NOT touch, NOT mic) ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT (2√Ч вАФ cools the warm raw-WebGL2; NOT SVG) ¬Ј K-S-key-finding/functional-analysis TECHNIQUE (lab-first) ¬Ј instructional/legible VIBE (NOT a JI-drone)]`. Dodges every HARD ban; cools the warm raw-WebGL2 renderer.
- **Mode:** `mode: DEEP` вАФ ONE big concept ("name the key + function you play, live"), three competing technical/visual approaches. Alternates off cycle 332's WIDE. Chosen per the orchestration rule (read JURY first): the jury wanted the instructional lane *deepened*, and DEEP-on-one-concept is the tool for "ship the depth, not a fourth fresh explorer."
- **Loves bias:** soft pulls from the systems/harmony/instructional love-cluster вАФ `223-fourier-paint`вЭ§пЄП (analysis-made-visible), `236-particle-life-song`вЭ§пЄП / `130-tsl-particle-compute`вЭ§пЄП (systems legibility), `157-concept-steer`вЭ§пЄП (steerable musical structure). No single love forced the pick; the JURY's instructional-lane directive governed.

**Orchestration (DEEP, 3 folder-isolated builders, parallel; pre-allocated 363/364/365):**
- **`365-cadence-ladder` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ K-S key-finding + functional Tonic/Subdominant/Dominant ladder + named cadence arcs + modulation ripple, three.js. **Won** on: **most instructional** (teaches WHY harmony moves вАФ tensionвЖТresolution made literal вАФ directly feeding the jury's named win-lane, where 363 "only" names key+function and 364 is abstract); **richest legible payoff** (named authentic/plagal/deceptive arcs + live Roman-numeral re-labeling on modulation); **most distinct from the existing 229-chord-canvas**; strongest/most-referenced README. page.tsx (444) + scene.ts (429) + key-finder.ts (288) + audio.ts (221) + README (171). - **`364-tonal-orbit` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І333, moved to /tmp)** вАФ **Elaine Chew's Spiral Array** (MIT 2000) in 3D: chord/key "center of effect" spheres travel through a helix of fifths; modulation = the center-of-gravity migrating across tonal space. The **most ambitious/surprising technique** of the slate (a genuine lab-first spatial-tonality model) but **lost on legibility** вАФ an abstract sphere drifting in a helix is exactly the abstraction the jury is steering the lab AWAY from. **Flagged as the multi-cycle thread to deepen** next adult cycle (it's the jury's "actually deepen something" answer in a fresh, non-Mirror-Canon form).
- **`363-key-compass` (banked вЖТ IDEAS ¬І333, moved to /tmp)** вАФ circle-of-fifths key wheel that **rotates to re-center on modulation** (the cleanest single "the ground moved" gesture); demo modulates CвЖТGвЖТEb (a bVI surprise to test the hysteresis). The **most iconic/immediately-readable** of the three but "only" names key+function (no cadence/tension teaching). Strong as a simpler companion or to fold its rotating-wheel gesture into 365.

**Verification posture:** verified from the actual winner code (page/scene/key-finder/audio skim + README read end-to-end) + a safety grep across all three (zero SVG `createElementNS`, zero `getContext('2d')` as a main renderer вАФ the two `2d` hits are CanvasTexture text-labels for three.js sprites, standard; zero api routes, zero `getUserMedia`, zero `use*`-named hook-trap helpers; `webkitAudioContext` casts are properly eslint-disabled) + the authoritative `npm run build` with ONLY 365 present. ## Cycle 332 вАФ 2026-06-06 14:26 UTC вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE (3 UNRELATED lab-first simulation toys) ¬Ј SHIPS `360-kids-sand-choir` вАФ the lab's **first falling-sand granular cellular automaton** (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). A 4-year-old pours streams of glowing warm sand from a top spout; **tilting the iPad** turns the world's gravity so the dunes flow and reshape left/right/down; seven harp strings tuned to **D-Dorian** cross the lower field, and every grain that comes to *rest on a string* plucks a soft KarplusвАУStrong note вАФ so **the shape of the dune you build IS the song** (the most legible cross-modal mapping the kids lane can make, the direct answer to the JURY's standing #1 "make it legible"). Auto-sways and plucks itself hands-free for the 06:30 phone review (no sensor needed); pointer-drag fallback on desktop; always-on D+A pad + brick-wall limiter so it's never silent and never harsh.

- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 = 358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337,334):** `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ¬Ј mic/voice INPUT ¬Ј inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј adult-JI-drone VIBE] ¬Ј picked=[tilt INPUT ¬Ј WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј falling-sand-CA TECHNIQUE ¬Ј kids-warm-elemental VIBE]`. - **Loves bias:** leaned on the kids tilt/physics love-cluster вАФ `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП (tilt), `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (Karplus pluck), `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП (cross-modal "build it вЖТ it sings"). ## Cycle 330 вАФ 2026-06-06 10:30 UTC вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 play-models for ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `355-kids-glass-armonica` вАФ a **Benjamin Franklin glass armonica** for kids: a row of 8 glasses you TUNE by dragging water up/down (more water = lower pitch вАФ the water level you SEE *is* the pitch you hear, the most literal cross-modal mapping the lab can make), then PLAY by **swiping a finger across the rims** so each glass the finger crosses *sings* a sustained, breathy, overlapping wash (the famous "otherworldly" armonica sustain вАФ NOT a struck bell). A ghost-finger auto-demo sweeps back and forth for ~12 s so the instrument plays itself at the 06:30 open. The lab's **first fill-to-tune instrument** and **first rubbed-glass continuous-armonica voice** вАФ water as a legible pitch dial, the inverse of an abstract glow.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..85394d9` (HEAD = cycle 329 `353-collapse-score`; 26 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica/`. Highest on-disk folder = 353 вЖТ pre-allocated **354/355/356** to the three DEEP Builders (collision-free). Winner shipped as `355-kids-glass-armonica`; losers `354-kids-water-glasses` + `356-kids-pour-organ` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/`, banked to IDEAS as text (no half-built folders in the commit).

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І330**: the dive's honest yield was a **lab-saturation audit**, not a fresh paper. WebSearch surfaced that browser hand/body tracking is now commodity (Google MediaPipe + Bolt's May-2026 face/hand-tracking starter templates) вАФ but a grep confirmed the lab ALREADY uses MediaPipe/camera/hand/shadow heavily (`234-kids-hand-creature`, `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `287-mirror-choir`, `302-mirror-canon-round`, `268`/`295` shadow), so that's not a novel axis here. [#5 cited as the research chain, honest path-a вАФ glass acoustics are foundational, not claimed <30-day.]

(b) **best 06:30 first-open** вАФ a self-playing ghost-finger *wash* is the most beautiful thing to open to on a phone, and the swept overlapping voices read the concept instantly; (c) **lowest 4yo skill-floor of the three** вАФ *swipe a finger across* needs no precision and can't be done "wrong," vs `356`'s two-vessel *pour* drag (a harder fine-motor + more abstract cause-effect) and `354`'s tap-then-it's-just-a-glockenspiel; (d) **most faithful to the named reference** (the armonica IS the rubbed-rim sustain, not a struck bell); (e) **code robustness** вАФ refs-driven rAF w/ dt-clamp, full teardown, correct pointer-capture + bounding-rect hit-test, clean tune-vs-swipe discrimination. **One curator fix applied to the winner** (within scope, build re-verified): the rig was only built on first `pointerdown`, making the auto-demo *visual-only* until a tap вАФ added a mount-time `initAudio()` so the demo SOUNDS wherever autoplay is permitted (still suspended/silent on iOS until first touch вАФ no regression). **`356-kids-pour-organ`** (the RICHEST concept вАФ conservation-of-water tuning, "pour here вЖТ that one goes low," 11 subsystems, auto-pour in the demo) **lost on 4yo skill-floor + struck-bell-not-novel-sound** and is **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build** (resurrect with a simpler one-finger pour, or pitch it slightly older). **`354-kids-water-glasses`** (the cleanest/simplest, pure struck glass-harp) **lost on lowest-surprise** (tap-struck bells the lab already has) and is **banked** (fold its clean tap-to-strike into a future struck piece, or ship if the lane wants a pure glass-harp). Both losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/`, banked to IDEAS as text.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 37 loved): soft additive pulls вАФ the tactile/bells/water cluster gently backs the concept (`317-kids-color-bells`вЭ§пЄП bellsвЖТglasses, `82-kids-color-piano`вЭ§пЄП a tuned row, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП water, `140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП playable tuned objects). Honest note: the loves lean slightly toward the *struck* sound (`317`), which would have favored `354`/`356` вАФ but surprise + novel-sound + first-open + the no-repeat-of-`350`-chain-reaction gate governed, so the love is cited as soft only and did NOT force the pick.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (audit warnings only, pre-existing) вЖТ moved 354 + 356 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with **only 355 present** вЖТ **вЬУ Compiled successfully in 34.7s, exit 0**, full route table emitted, `/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica вЧЛ (Static) 5.56 kB` (**112 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). The one curator edit (mount-time audio init) was build-re-verified clean. Remaining build warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code (fonts, unused vars in `recording`/`insights`/etc.). **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** вАФ real unverified risks (per the README + my read): the water-levelвЖТpitch ratio (√Ч1.65 max) is a musical approximation not a calibrated physics model; whether the **tune (vertical drag) vs play (horizontal swipe)** gesture discrimination reads cleanly for a 4yo on a real touch screen (the 10px threshold is adult-tuned); whether the continuous armonica wash sounds gorgeous vs muddy with 8 voices overlapping on a phone speaker; iOS AudioContext unlock on real hardware.

## Cycle 329 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE (3 UNRELATED explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `353-collapse-score` вАФ an adult generative piece that COMPOSES ITSELF in front of you by **Wave Function Collapse**, the lab's FIRST WFC piece (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). An 8√Ч16 lattice (8 voice layers √Ч 16 beat columns) begins in superposition; the solver collapses the lowest-Shannon-entropy cell to a weighted-random D-Dorian note, then BFS-propagates harmonic adjacency constraints to its neighbours вАФ and you WATCH it: dim candidate-count cells snap to bright note-labelled cells, constrained neighbours flash as the ripple spreads, while a playhead sweeps leftвЖТright and SOUNDS each collapsed note (FM pad + bell). Composition as a *visible logical process* вАФ the exact inverse of the "abstract glowing cloud" the jury asked us to kill (the most literal answer to jury #1: make it LEGIBLE). Seeded mulberry32 вЖТ deterministic Replay; auto-reseeds on fill (long-form, never the same twice). Auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if autoplay blocked), alive at the 06:30 review with full payoff in ~10 seconds.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..89e98ed` (HEAD = cycle 328 `350-kids-bump-along`; 25 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current full 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` before the authoritative build (`next` confirmed installed; node v22). The buildable anchor the dive surfaced: **Wave Function Collapse** (Gumin 2016) + **Model Synthesis** (Merrell 2007) вАФ a deterministic seed-reproducible constraint solver the lab has **never** used. Honest freshness (JURY #5): WFC (2016) + JI synth are foundational, NOT <30-day вАФ the recent-and-surprising signal is *direction-of-field* (server-side surge keeps the client high-ground for *legible deterministic* pieces) + the lab-gap audit. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build is direct (path-a): ¬І329 dive вЖТ grep-correction (MIDI/Tonnetz/Reich-phasing already present вАФ KILLED; WFC/breath-entrainment/erosion confirmed fresh) вЖТ a WIDE-3 adult fire вЖТ shipped the WFC composer the dive proposed.

## Cycle 328 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 physics/interaction approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `350-kids-bump-along` вАФ the lab's FIRST chain-reaction music machine for kids (110+ kids prototypes, ZERO chain-reaction pieces before вАФ grep-verified): a row of 7 sleepy, breathing creatures (each a bold color + a C-major-pentatonic note, BANDIMAL left=lowвЖТright=high); tap one and a visible "bump" travels down the line вАФ each creature wakes, squash-stretches, and SINGS as the wave reaches it вАФ then it reflects off the far end and rolls back for a return melody. Tap the middle вЖТ two waves outward; tap both ends вЖТ they meet in the middle (a chord). DRAG a creature sideways to reorder the row вЖТ the wave plays the new order (composition by rearrangement). One little push вЖТ a whole melodic wave you can WATCH travel, bounce, and return. Auto-plays itself hands-free (a demo bump fires from the left every ~5.5s while idle; creatures breathe perpetually), so it's alive at the 06:30 review with zero interaction.

## Cycle 327 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE (3 unrelated explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `347-the-place` вАФ a long-form ADULT drone scored by the listener's REAL local sky: the device clock + (optional) geolocation are turned, **locally with no network**, into the live solar altitude/azimuth, moon phase/illumination, and season, which drive an evolving just-intonation choir over a raw-WebGL2 horizon вАФ genuinely different at 3am than at noon, the scale-color shifting with the season. A two-axis **time scrubber** (hour-of-day + day-of-year) lets a reviewer hear the whole dawnвЖТnoonвЖТduskвЖТnight arc in seconds (the verifiability move that won curation); untouched it tracks real wall-clock time. After **John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen*** (his Fairbanks sun/moon/aurora installation). (c) **reward legibility** вАФ the swoop-to-center + chime + sparkle + haptic per animal is the most discrete, unmistakable "I caught it!" event (348's progress-bar is close; 347 has none); (d) **richest subsystem count** + cleanest embodiment of "play music with your ears." **`348-kids-song-catcher`** (the most jury-#1-legible вАФ you assemble a *known* melody note-by-note into a visible ribbon) **lost only on surprise/playability** (localizing a single note by ear is harder for a 4yo than 6 simultaneous distinct timbres; "collect animals" out-charms "catch notes") and is **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build**. **`347-kids-echo-cave`** (simplest interaction, lovely spatial round) **banked but flagged**: the call-and-echo lane is jury-saturated (94/102/142/280/298вА¶), its differentiation is "real but subtle" (its own README), and it has the weakest reward legibility + least agency вАФ resurrect ONLY if differentiated (make turning *required* to wake each creature). Both losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS as text (no half-built folders in the commit).
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 37 loved): soft additive pulls вАФ the creature/ocean/firefly cluster gently backs 346 (`234-kids-hand-creature`вЭ§пЄП find/interact-with-a-creature, `107-ocean-presence`вЭ§пЄП whale/ambient, `166-kids-lantern`вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП), and the spatial cluster (`148-spatial-palette`вЭ§пЄП) backs the HRTF lineage. No single love forced the pick вАФ kid rotation + the JURY-#2 non-screen directive + the diversity audit (device-orientation 0√Ч, avoid a 2nd consonance duet) + verifiability governed.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (audit warnings only, pre-existing) вЖТ moved 347 + 348 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with **only 346 present** вЖТ **вЬУ Compiled successfully in 26.1s**, full route table emitted, `/dream/346-kids-sound-hunt вЧЛ (Static) 6.01 kB` (**109 kB First Load вАФ Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). **No fix attempts needed** (346 was build-clean as delivered; tsc + eslint clean). Remaining build warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code (fonts, unused vars in `recording`/`insights`/etc.). **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** вАФ the real unverified risks (per the README): real HRTF localization quality (generic KEMAR model; front/back confusion without head movement; a 4yo's small ears differ вАФ but the compass glow + tap-shortcut carry the loop regardless); real `deviceorientation` feel + the iOS permission branch on a physical phone; whether a real 4yo will "turn to find" something invisible; haptics no-op on iOS.

## Cycle 325 вАФ 2026-06-06 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE (3 unrelated explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `345-speech-melody` вАФ the lab's FIRST natural-language вЖТ music piece: type a line (a poem, a memory) and Resonance compiles its SPEECH into a Jan√°ƒНek-style "speech melody" вАФ each word's vowels become pitches on a D-Dorian ladder (vowel height вЖТ pitch height), its consonant clusters become percussion (plosiveвЖТclick, voiced-stopвЖТthud, sibilantвЖТhiss, liquid/nasalвЖТring), word stress + capitalization + sentence position вЖТ accent/duration, punctuation вЖТ rests/phrase-breaks вАФ deterministic (same text вЖТ same melody), and the typed WORDS light up one at a time as they sound over a glowing raw-WebGL2 pitch-contour ribbon, so you RECOGNIZE your own words being sung. Directly answers the jury's #1 live provocation ("make his music LEGIBLE вАФ let him recognize what he played, not another nebula"). Auto-plays a Welcome-Home line on load (alive at the 06:30 review with zero typing); fully usable on a phone by typing.

## Cycle 324 вАФ 2026-06-05 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј DEEP (3 interaction-model approaches to ONE concept) ¬Ј SHIPS `341-kids-star-pair` вАФ the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide it (or hum) up/down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light. The two voices sound continuously over a D drone; out of tune you HEAR real acoustic beating + SEE the stars jitter; land within ¬±35¬Ґ of a just-intonation ratio and the beating vanishes, a bright beam snaps between the stars, they pulse together, a chime rings, ~60 sparkles burst вАФ one discrete, *silently-legible* "we connected!" event. Drag is the 4yo-primary control (hum yields to it); solo on one phone вЖТ a robot рЯ§Ц drives the far star, pausing near consonances, so the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no second device AND no mic.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..28c66ac` (HEAD = cycle 323 `337-seismic-globe`; 20 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current full 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/341-kids-star-pair/`. Highest on-disk folder = 337 вЖТ pre-allocated **340/341/342** to the three DEEP Builders (skipped 338/339 вАФ those are ¬І323 adult IDEAS text-seeds, not on disk; collision-free). Winner shipped as `341-kids-star-pair`; losers `340-kids-duet-bridge` + `342-kids-whale-song` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS as text.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І324**: *zero-server collaborative web audio is mainstreaming in 2026 вАФ and the unbuilt corner is real-time INTERPERSONAL consonance: two players who must tune to EACH OTHER by ear.* Sources: the 2026 collaborative-music tooling wave (Soundation real-time co-production; *Multi Web Audio Sequencer*) + this lab's own `319-hub-score`/`334` BroadcastChannel lineage, anchored on the perceptual foundation (Helmholtz *On the Sensations of Tone* вАФ consonance = absence of beating; the consonance/beating-cues literature). Searched arXiv `cs.SD/recent` (last 7 days вАФ all speech/TTS/enhancement; nothing on collaborative/co-performance/tuning) + collaborative-kids-music queries: **no <30-day on-point paper exists.** Honest freshness (JURY #5 no-fake-novelty): BroadcastChannel + autocorrelation + Helmholtz beating are foundational, NOT a <30-day technique вАФ the recent-and-surprising signal is *direction-of-field* (collaborative web audio went mainstream in 2026) **combined with the lab-gap audit**: the lab has a SOLO tuning toy (`272-kids-tune-purr`, one child vs a fixed drone) + turn-taking multi-user (`334`), but **zero real-time SIMULTANEOUS co-play** where two humans each hold one live voice and the target is the interval *between them*. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build is direct: ¬І324 + the queued ¬І322 `335-kids-duet-bridge` seed вЖТ the DEEP-3 kids slate вЖТ shipped the most-verifiable winner.

## Cycle 319 вАФ 2026-06-05 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј WIDE (3 explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `327-physarum-choir` вАФ you don't play notes, you plant TONES AS FOOD, and a living slime-mold network decides over seconds which to connect: ~1,048,576 Physarum agents run in a WGSL `@compute` shader (sense-ahead-L/C/R вЖТ steer to the strongest chemoattractant вЖТ atomic deposit вЖТ 3√Ч3 diffuse/decay/food-inject ping-pong), Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano seeds the food nodes (onset+pitch вЖТ JI position), and a reduce+`mapAsync` readback measures how strongly the slime has reached each node вЖТ that connectivity drives a D-rooted just-intonation choir where each node's voice swells in as the network joins it, so the live chord IS the live topology вАФ the slime composes the harmony

So the ¬І318 seed's projected ambition **#1 does NOT hold** and was NOT claimed; the honest novelty is the **WebGPU *compute* implementation** + the **connectivity-graphвЖТharmony mapping** (the slime as composer). Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)**: ¬І319 вЖТ WIDE-3 adult fire (physarum / stillness / seismic) вЖТ `327` implements the physarum hook with Karel's real recording seeding the food.

**and a genuinely complete Canvas2D/CPU twin** at ~4k agents with the identical model + connectivity read-out; 326 and 328 also returned complete, clean folders with full teardown). **Why 327 won**: (a) **ambition вАФ 3/5 vs 2/5**: it clears #2(four subsystems)+#3(named refs Adamatzky/Jenson/Jones/Simulacra Naturae)+#5(this fire's ¬І319 research), where 326 and 328 sit at 2/5; shipping 326/328 would break that chain (both came from ¬І317's bank); (c) **"massively bigger" + surprise**: a ~1M-agent GPU slime network composing a JI chord from his own piano is the highest "huh, didn't know we could do that"; Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c) dive**, NOT a manufactured <30-day arXiv claim вАФ the anchors are foundational/named; the surprise is in the *recombination* (a recording you fly through; a sound that is its own picture; an instrument that rewards quiet). The dive's value: each anchor exposes a real *gap in our lab* вАФ we own *live-reactive* spectral clouds (`243`/`267`) but never an *inhabitable fixed spectral world* of a whole performance. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)**: ¬І315 вЖТ WIDE-3 adult briefs (inhabit-the-recording / chaotic-attractor / stillness) вЖТ ship the strongest directive-and-love-aligned winner.

## Cycle 313 вАФ 2026-06-05 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (2 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `319-hub-score` вАФ the lab's FIRST networked / multi-instance piece: every open browser tab is one sustained voice in a serverless, wall-clock-synced just-intonation ensemble, and any tab can take the baton to conduct the whole room's harmony (The Hub, in a browser)

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..e07d6eb` (HEAD = cycle 312 `317-kids-color-bells`; tags pulled). Winner shipped as `319-hub-score`; loser `318-ensemble-room` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І313**: *serverless multiplayer browser instruments + the wall-clock-as-conductor trick* вАФ the networked-music lineage (The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers, 1978вАУ80s) reborn in the tab, corroborated by the current multiplayer-browser-instrument trend (PollySynth multiplayer polyphonic synth; Tone.js self-playing generative ensembles surfaced in 2026 creative-coding roundups). Honest per JURY #5: this is a **path-(c) consume** of the banked, research-chained `282-ensemble-tabs` seed (League/Hub lineage), **not** a manufactured <30-day arXiv claim вАФ the live cs.SD front is still generative-audio-conversion (carried ¬І303вАУ312), so I anchored on the named lineage + the multiplayer-instrument trend rather than forcing a frontier novelty. The dive's value: BroadcastChannel + `Date.now()` as a shared metronome lets every same-origin tab lock to one beat with **zero clock-sync handshake** вАФ the missing-from-the-lab multi-user axis, finally buildable serverless. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (c)**: ¬І313 вЖТ DEEP briefs A/B (two approaches to the serverless shared room) вЖТ ship the stronger.

## Cycle 309 вАФ 2026-06-04 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP-continue (solo) ¬Ј DEEPENS `308-orbit-choir` вЖТ cycle 2: the spatial choir is now sung by Karel's REAL *Welcome Home* piano (first time "use his actual music" reaches the non-screen spatial layer) + first haptic output + localStorage room-memory

Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І309**: *Janet Cardiff's **The Forty Part Motet** (2001) вАФ a choir spatially exploded into forty speakers you walk among вАФ is touring again in 2026 (MIMOCA; National Gallery of Canada).* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (the Motet technique is foundational; the 2026 tour is the dated/named anchor). Its value is the **reframe**: it turns "deepen 308 with real stems" from a timbre swap into a *bigger idea* вАФ **his album, spatially exploded into a room you gather with your head**. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: continues the standing multi-cycle spatial thread (b) AND implements the Motet hook + 308's own un-built README deepenings (a).

- **Action = Continue / deepen (Decide priority #2), JURY-headline-directed**: 309 % 2 = 1 вЖТ adult. STATE ¬І308 queued cycle 309 verbatim as *"the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real Welcome Home piano stems вА¶ multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2."* **JURY.md (2026-06-04) provocation #1 governs**: *"Deepen 308 with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems вАФ do NOT ship a sixth sensor-noodle. The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it (real stems + haptics + localStorage persistence). The standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer."* This is exactly that build.
- **Mode: solo DEEP-continue (not WIDE/DEEP fan-out)** вАФ the orchestration WIDE/DEEP modes fan out *new* folders; an in-place deepen of one existing multi-cycle folder can't be parallelized into isolated folders. Precedent: cycle 305 was likewise a *"deepen (solo)"* of `302-mirror-canon-round`. Recorded `mode: solo-deepen (multi-cycle thread #3 вЖТ cycle 2)`.
- **What shipped (`308-orbit-choir` cycle 2)** вАФ three deepenings, all from 308's own README "Next-cycle deepening" list, plus the Motet reframe:
  1. **Real stems (the headline).** The 7 synth voices are replaced by Karel's actual recordings via the public, anon, no-auth `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids + titles) вЖТ `/api/audio/[id]` (signed URL per track) вАФ the SAME path the loved `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП / `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП use. `loadStems()` picks the album whose name/artist matches `welcome|karel` (else first), spreads up to 7 tracks evenly, `Promise.allSettled`s per-track fetch вЖТ `decodeAudioData`. Each becomes a looping `AudioBufferSource` вЖТ lowpass (the blur/sharpen axis) вЖТ breathing-LFO gain вЖТ its own HRTF `PannerNode`. The arc now glides **`playbackRate` (detuned вЖТ 1.0)** + **lowpass cutoff (вЙИ540 Hz вЖТ вЙИ6 kHz)** instead of oscillator pitch вАФ so each recording goes from a warbling, muffled distance to clear-and-true while orbiting inward: **you gather his album into a clear room around your head** (the *Forty Part Motet* of his own piano).
  2. **Haptics вАФ a lab FIRST** (`navigator.vibrate`): a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you're facing* locks home (`progressвЙ•0.92 && swell>0.35`, latched once via `resolvedFired`), and a `[18,40,18]` triple-pulse when the whole room resolves.
  3. **Persistence** (`localStorage` key `resonance.dream.orbit-choir.gather.v1`): gather-progress is written ~every 4 s (monotonic); on return the idle button reads **"Return to the room"** + an emerald *"your room was N% gathered вАФ it remembers"* note, and `startTimeRef` is offset so the arc **resumes** where it left off. "Begin again" + full resolve clear it.
- **Graceful fallback is load-bearing**: `<2` tracks decode (offline / private preview / CDN block / no featured album) вЖТ reverts to the **original cycle-1 synth resolving-chord choir** with the full pitch-glide path intact; the top label states which source plays (`Karel's Welcome Home ¬Ј N voices` vs `synthesised choir (album offline)`). The synth code path is fully preserved, so a no-network sandbox still demos. Also added: a faced-voice **track-title** readout, a `loading` phase ("Gathering the roomвА¶"), and stem `src` nodes added to the teardown.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + multi-cycle(#4)`. **#1** вАФ first `navigator.vibrate` HAPTIC output in 300+ prototypes AND first time a real audio *source* drives the spatial/HRTF layer. **#2** вАФ DeviceOrientation head-tracker + N-voice HRTF panner scene + featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + convolver reverb + 360 s convergence state machine + localStorage room-memory (вЙИ6). **#3** вАФ Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* (2001, touring 2026) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Pauline Oliveros. **#4** вАФ multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2 (it was claimed as a multi-cycle commitment in 308's README). (Honest: #5 not strictly claimed вАФ ¬І309 is a path-(b)/(c) dive, not a <30-day frontier find; the four above already clear the floor 2√Ч.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308,311; JURY 2026-06-04 bans): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬Ј phone-motion/orientation-as-screen-object INPUT ¬Ј no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic] ¬Ј picked(308 cyc2)=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬Ј DeviceOrientation-as-LISTENER-rotation INPUT (rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬Ј pure-spatial-HRTF-AUDIO OUTPUT (screen is a footnote; the lab's only non-screen output) ¬Ј real-recording-source + HRTF-convergence + haptics + localStorage TECHNIQUE ¬Ј A-natural-minor-add9 (synth fallback) / Karel's-own-keys (stems)]`. - **No API route created / no `guard` needed** вАФ the prototype only *reads* same-origin public GETs (`/api/featured`, `/api/audio/[id]`) which have no side effects and no secrets; the guard rule applies to api routes *I create* under `src/app/dream/`, and none were. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- **In-place deepen vs immutability**: deepening the existing `308-orbit-choir` folder in place follows the established multi-cycle precedent (291-harmonograph reached cycle 3, 302-mirror-canon cycle 2 вАФ both modified in place). The immutability rule (no deleting/penalizing prototypes by vote) is intact; multi-cycle threads are explicitly sanctioned by AGENT.md criterion #4 and the JURY's own "Deepen 308" directive.
- **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified surface: whether 7 simultaneous piano recordings, HRTF-separated with only-the-faced-one-bright, read as a coherent "listening room" vs. mush (the central bet вАФ mitigated by per-voice distance attenuation + dark scatter cutoff so distant voices are quiet); whether `/api/featured` returns a usable Welcome Home album in prod (fallback covers the no); haptic + resume feel on a real phone; iOS DeviceOrientation permission branch unchanged from cycle 1.
