## Cycle 308 вАФ 2026-06-04 (UTC) вАФ kids build ¬Ј WIDE (3 explorers) ¬Ј SHIPS `311-kids-music-box` вАФ the lab's FIRST kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..c2b8cd9` (HEAD = cycle 307 `308-orbit-choir`; the `jury: verdict 2026-06-04` commit also landed). NO force-push divergence (3rd clean sync running вАФ the recurring drift continues to stay fixed). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/311-kids-music-box/`. Highest committed folder = 308 вЖТ pre-allocated **309/310/311** to the three WIDE builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `311-kids-music-box`; losers `309-kids-echo-duet` + `310-kids-sing-back` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` (fallback retention) and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І308**: *reflexive interaction вАФ a system that mirrors/varies the child's own input (Pachet's **Continuator**, 2002; Addessi's **MIROR** project) вАФ is the validated way to make a kids music piece engaging WITHOUT a no-fail wash; it carries the experience on **memory + turn-taking**, not endless forgiving noodling.* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (Continuator/MIROR are foundational; the only strictly-recent dated anchor is a Jan-2026 executive-function meta-analysis about *benefits*, not technique). The value is the **principle** вАФ exactly the theory for discharging JURY #2 ("build a kids piece with memory or consequence"). Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: all three explorers implement "carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed"; the winner ships.

- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 308 % 2 = 0; no blocker; the queued adult 308-orbit-choir deepening is explicitly assigned to cycle 309 (an *adult* fire) by STATE ¬І307. STATE ¬І306/¬І307 queued cycle 308 as the kids build (decide clap-band's fate / break the recipe). **JURY.md (2026-06-04) is decisive and governs**: provocation #2 вАФ "**Break the kids recipe.** Five straight kids fires are 'new sensor вЖТ no-fail modal bed.' Ban that form for one kids cycle: build a kids piece with **memory or consequence** вАФ the child can make something *wrong* and fix it, or what they did *persists and grows*. `298-echo-friend` already pointed this way; nothing followed it." The JURY's banned set this cycle: **raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬Ј phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬Ј the new-sensorвЖТno-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic.** (Note: JURY #1 вАФ deepen 308 with Karel's real piano stems вАФ is explicitly "the next *adult* build" вЖТ deferred to cycle 309.)
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** вАФ cycle 307 was DEEP; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate вЖТ WIDE. Three **distinct kids FORMS that all carry memory/consequence**, each dodging every banned tag: (309) Continuator/MIROR call-and-response **duet** (memory + turn-taking), (310) Simon-grows memory game with **real-but-kind right/wrong** (consequence), (311) rotating music-box **sequencer that persists to localStorage** (persists + grows). Pre-allocated 309/310/311; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D/three.js + localStorage; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets вЖТ no `guard`).
- **Curation вЖТ WINNER `311-kids-music-box`**: I verified from the **actual code + READMEs + the authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (309/310 builders again mis-reported some helper files as "pre-existing" вАФ the recurring memory artifact; code is genuinely theirs, created 14:08вАУ14:11 during the run). **Why 311 won**: (a) 309 and 310 are *both* Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pieces вАФ the lab's over-represented form (JURY: 13/15 outputs to a screen, mostly the same way); 311 is the only candidate that breaks that pattern with a **3D physical-object metaphor** AND dodges the banned fragment-shader monoculture. (b) It's the **"massively bigger" pick** per Karel's standing mandate вАФ a *composition machine* the child builds, not a reactive toy. (c) **localStorage persistence is a genuine lab-first for kids** вАФ no kids prototype has ever remembered state across sessions; it hits JURY #2's "*what they did persists and grows*" verbatim. The curating fire also fixed a real **pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. 309 (tightest research chain) + 310 (most literal "wrong and fix it") banked as strong ship-ready seeds.
- **Ambition floor: 3/5** (need 2): `ambition: вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + recent-research(#5)`. **#2** вАФ KS audio engine + three.js/r3f 3D scene + per-frame sequencer clock + localStorage persistence = 4 subsystems. **#3** вАФ Swiss cylinder musical box (c.1796, Geneva) + Karplus-Strong (1983). **#5** вАФ RESEARCH ¬І308 (reflexive interaction), added this fire. (Honest: KS isn't a lab-first technique вАФ used in 303/105 вАФ so #1 not claimed; persistence-across-sessions is arguably a lab-first but counted under the cleaner #2/#3/#5.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped/banked: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308 + banked 304/305; JURY's explicit bans this cycle): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬Ј phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬Ј no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic] ¬Ј picked(311)=[touch-slot INPUT ¬Ј three.js-3D-object OUTPUT ¬Ј physical-sequencer + Karplus-Strong + localStorage-persistence TECHNIQUE ¬Ј warm-toy/craft kids VIBE ¬Ј D-Lydian-hexachord]`. Dodges every banned tag вАФ and the winner specifically breaks the Canvas2D-creature form its own two siblings shared.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the loop/memory + tactile/craft cluster pulls here вАФ `172-loop-station`вЭ§пЄП, `160-kids-paint-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП (loop/memory), `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (the physical-pluck/Karplus timbre 311 uses), `111-kids-shape-loop`вЭ§пЄП, `100-kids-paint-song`вЭ§пЄП. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY #2 + the ambition/diversity gates governed.

**What shipped (`311-kids-music-box`)**: a near-black warm screen; tap **Start** (resumes AudioContext, loads the saved tune or seeds a simple D-Lydian one so the box is already singing). A slowly-rotating 3D **music-box cylinder** (three.js via @react-three/fiber): wooden barrel + brass caps, a fixed color-coded **comb** that plucks each pin as it rolls past, raised colored **pin studs** that "pop"+glow on pluck. Grid = 14 time-steps around the circumference √Ч 6 pitch-rows along the length; **tap a front-face slot** to add/remove a pin (front-face-only via a surface-normal¬Јcamera test on an invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body). The pin pattern **persists to `localStorage`** (try/catch degrade), so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and the box **remembers across reloads** вАФ the whole point. Audio = **Karplus-Strong** plucked tones (one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch: filtered noise burst вЖТ tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback вЖТ A/R envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized convolver reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + 0.55 master so dense patterns stay safe. **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B вАФ NOT C-major-pentatonic). Controls: рЯІє Start fresh (clear), вПЄ Hold / вЦґ Spin. No-reading (colors = notes, studs = melody; a tiny caption for the grown-up). Fallbacks: no WebGL вЖТ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вЖТ notice, box still spins. Audio disposed on unmount. Kids ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 4.74 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: KS timbre by ear (per-row brightness/damping), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, three.js disposal across a live unmount.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вЖТ moved 309 + 310 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` вЖТ authoritative `npm run build` with **only 311 present** вЖТ **exit 0**, `/dream/311-kids-music-box вЧЛ (Static) 4.74 kB` (347 kB First Load JS вАФ the three.js/r3f bundle, expected for a 3D piece), all 339 static pages generated. **No fix attempts needed** (the builder had already fixed the pluck-alignment + TS-generic issues). Zero warnings/errors attributable to 311; remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code.

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 309 (adult) вАФ JURY #1, the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems.** The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it: (a) replace synth voices with his real piano stems via `/api/audio/[id]` (the standing "use his actual music" directive has NEVER reached the spatial layer), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse when a faced voice resolves (first haptic output), (c) localStorage persistence of how far you'd gathered the room. This is multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2.
- **Cycle 310 (kids): ship a banked memory/consequence sibling** вАФ `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows, real-but-kind right/wrong вАФ the cleanest "make something wrong and fix it") OR `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator duet) вАФ both build-verified this fire. Continue breaking the recipe (JURY #2); do NOT regress to a sensor-noodle.
- **Standing breadth still unshipped**: real-world-data sonification (JURY #3 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І289 seismic, only 1 entry and it's kids+pentatonic); AI-pipeline-chain embedded in AV (JURY #4 вАФ RESEARCH ¬І285, Karel's explicit directive, ZERO in last 15); `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel, never shipped).
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: INDEX "Newest/Previous/Earlier/Older" chain is getting deep + STATE ordering is mixed; worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вАФ pure client-side Web Audio + three.js + localStorage; no mic, camera, network, or secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; three/@react-three were already in package.json вАФ package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- **WIDE-3 orchestration = the portfolio choreography**: planner sets 3 distinct briefs (3 memory/consequence FORMS) вЖТ 3 parallel folder-isolated makers вЖТ critic reads the actual code + READMEs + runs the authoritative build + enforces taste/diversity (shipped the one that breaks the form its siblings shared) вЖТ curator ships one validated winner + 2 ready-to-revive seeds. Directly answers Karel's "too similar / massively bigger" mandate by exploring three unrelated kids directions in one fire and shipping the biggest.
- **JURY alignment**: discharges provocation #2 (break the kids recipe вАФ memory/consequence, recipe banned) cleanly; defers #1 (deepen 308 with real piano) to the next *adult* cycle as the JURY itself directs.

## Cycle 307 вАФ 2026-06-04 (UTC) вАФ adult build ¬Ј DEEP (2 approaches) ¬Ј SHIPS `308-orbit-choir` вАФ the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first spatial piece

**Git sync / env**: clean this fire вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..015d8c8` (HEAD = cycle 306 `306-kids-rain-shaker`); NO force-push divergence (2nd clean sync running). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present) вАФ the recurring stale-AGENT drift did NOT recur. `node_modules` shipped absent вЖТ `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`. Highest committed folder = 306; pre-allocated **307/308** to the two DEEP builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `308-orbit-choir`; loser `307-still-room` removed after curation and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вЖТ RESEARCH **¬І307**: *head MOVEMENT (not position) is what makes generic browser-HRTF legible* вАФ arXiv:2510.09161 (HRTF individualisation + head movements). Empirically, active head-turning collapses the front/back & in-head confusions that Web Audio's generic `panningModel="HRTF"` suffers вАФ so the cheap generic browser HRTF becomes legible **iff the listener turns**, which is exactly what a phone's `DeviceOrientation` already affords. The build's core gesture IS the disambiguator. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)+(c)**: implements ¬І295's un-spent head-tracked-spatial shelf.

- **Action = banked adult breadth (Decide priority #4, JURY-directed pivot)**: 307 % 2 = 1 вЖТ adult. STATE ¬І305/¬І306 queued cycle 307 as *Mirror-Canon CYCLE 3 polish* **only if the thread still feels alive after 3 cycles; else pivot to banked adult breadth*. I pivoted вАФ the Mirror-Canon thread (303 ship + 305 deepen) has demonstrated the multi-cycle commitment the JURY asked for; a 3rd polish fire would be incremental. **JURY.md (2026-06-03) is decisive and points elsewhere**: provocation #3 ("the lab has banked three spatial/non-screen pieces and shipped ZERO вАФ resurrect one and SHIP it"), #4 ("build on the unused half of RESEARCH ¬І295 вАФ the head-tracked-spatial-audio finding that produced `still-room`, banked not shipped"), #5 ("for one cycle, ban the audioвЖТvisual driver entirely вАФ build something whose output isn't a screen visualizer"). All three resolve to the same banked piece. This is "ship the breadth you've already paid for."
- **Mode: DEEP (2 approaches to one concept)** вАФ concept = the lab's first audio-FIRST / non-screen HRTF spatial room navigated by head-turn. Approach A = `307-still-room` (faithful Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*: 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn to tune in). Approach B = `308-orbit-choir` (the same spatial foundation given a **6-minute long-form, stateful convergence arc** вАФ voices orbit inward + glide from a detuned cluster into a warm A-minor-add9 chord; you shepherd voices home by facing them). Pre-allocated 307/308; spawned 2 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). Neither touched git or shared docs; neither needed an API route (pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets вЖТ no `guard`).
- **Curation вЖТ WINNER `308-orbit-choir`**: 308 is the strict superset вАФ it contains everything still-room does (HRTF room + DeviceOrientation listener-rotation + faced-voice swell + Deep-Listening framing) **plus** the long-form/stateful arc the JURY explicitly craves ("different at minute 6 than minute 0"), which fills the categorical-menu's *long-form generative (5+ min, state/memory/evolution)* gap the lab is thin on. Both built clean (full `npm run build` with both present = exit 0; each agent reported clean tsc + ESLint). Removed `307-still-room`, re-ran the **authoritative build winner-only = exit 0** (`/dream/308-orbit-choir` 3.92 kB). `307-still-room` banked to IDEAS as the calmer fixed-room sibling.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** вАФ `#1 never-used technique` (FIRST HRTF spatial-audio output + FIRST `DeviceOrientation` listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes вАФ the lab has avoided HRTF for 300 cycles; grep INDEX = 0 shipped spatial pieces despite 3 banked) ¬Ј `#2 вЙ•3 subsystems` (DeviceOrientation head-tracker + HRTF panner graph + 7-voice synth scene + synthesized convolver reverb + a 6-min azimuth+pitch convergence state machine = 4-5) ¬Ј `#3 named reference` (La Monte Young *Dream House*, √Йliane Radigue, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) ¬Ј `#5 recent research` (RESEARCH ¬І307 / ¬І295, this fire + within-14-days). Recorded `ambition: novel-technique(#1) + вЙ•3-subsystems(#2) + named-ref(#3) + recent-research(#5)`.
- **Diversity audit** (last 10: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306 + banked 304/305): over-represented = kids VIBE (5√Ч: 290/293/295/298/303/306), tilt/deviceorientation-orientation INPUT (290/293/303/306), matte-Canvas2D + raw-WebGL OUTPUT (most). `diversity: banned=[kids-vibe, tilt-orientation-input, matte-canvas/webgl-visual-output, pentatonic] ¬Ј picked=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬Ј device-orientation-HEADING-as-listener-rotation INPUT (a NEW use of the sensor вАФ rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬Ј pure-spatial-HRTF-audio OUTPUT (screen is a faint footnote вАФ the FIRST build whose output is not a screen visualizer) ¬Ј long-form-convergence + HRTF TECHNIQUE]`. Directly executes JURY #5 ("ban the audioвЖТvisual driver") вАФ this is the lab's first piece where sound is the content and the screen is the footnote.
- **Love signal**: votes API shows loved spatial/immersive pieces вАФ `148-spatial-palette` вЭ§пЄП, `107-ocean-presence` вЭ§пЄП, `227-paths-granular` вЭ§пЄП, `130-tsl-particle-compute` вЭ§пЄП. No shipped HRTF piece existed to love; this is the first. Pulled toward the immersive-room direction those loves imply.

**What shipped (`308-orbit-choir`)**: near-black audio-first screen; tap "Begin the orbit" (resumes AudioContext + requests iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same gesture). 7 sustained HRTF-panned voices start scattered + detuned into a soft cluster; over a 360s eased scheduler they orbit inward to an even ring **and** their pitches glide (`setTargetAtTime`) into a warm **A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth** chord вАФ so spatial field and harmony resolve together. `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener` (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); facing a voice swells it and floors its personal resolution forward, so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace. Synthesized convolver reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no files). Fallback chain: sensor вЖТ pointer-drag вЖТ arrow keys вЖТ hands-free auto-tour, with a readable `text-rose-300` notice when the sensor's inactive (separate notice if Web Audio is absent). Thin violet progress ring + `M:SS вАФ state` label (`scattered вЖТ drifting in вЖТ gathering вЖТ almost home вЖТ resolved`) + "Begin again" hold state + a faint violet orbital-map canvas (guide, not the point). Full ref-based teardown on unmount. Headphones hint (HRTF needs binaural). Adult ¬Ј zero new deps ¬Ј zero API route ¬Ј no guard ¬Ј 3.92 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вАФ unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet rides on this), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, the shepherding feel, and front/back disambiguation on a real DeviceOrientation stream.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вАФ pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no recording, no network, no secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- The design-notes link points at `/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md` (lab convention вАФ App Router won't serve README as a route, so the link 404s; carried, matches prior prototypes, not a build blocker вАФ worth a future `_shared` notes-viewer).

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 308 (kids)**: 308 % 2 = 0 вЖТ kids. **DECIDE `304-kids-clap-band`'s fate** вАФ now thrice-banked (strongest-floor rhythm lane but keeps losing on experience): either ship it outright (the missing rhythm/percussion lane; pairs with 298 pitch / 303 tilt / 306 shake) or deliberately retire it. `305-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath) also available. Must dodge JURY's kids bans (touch-input + matte-canvas + pentatonic-poke).
- **Cycle 309+ (adult): DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` (multi-cycle thread #3)** вАФ the README's three deepenings: (a) replace synth voices with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems (the standing "use his actual music" directive), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse the instant a faced voice reaches full resolution (first haptic output), (c) `localStorage` persistence so the room remembers how far you'd gathered it across sessions. OR ship the banked `307-still-room` (faithful fixed-room Deep Listening sibling) as a calmer companion. OR remaining banked breadth: `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel вАФ JURY #3, still never shipped).
- **Mirror-Canon thread**: parked at cycle 2 (`302`); its planned cycle-3 polish is deferred in favor of opening the spatial thread. Revivable if a vote signal asks.

**Git sync / env**: **clean this fire** вАФ `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` = **"Already up to date"** (NO force-push divergence вАФ the first clean sync in many cycles), HEAD = cycle 305 `2e98f5e` (last committed folder `303-kids-wind-harp`; `302-mirror-canon-round` deepened in place at cyc305). **Research dive (mandatory, logged RESEARCH ¬І306)**: web tools healthy. Targeted the mechanic the three kids briefs share вАФ a child's *body action* turned into always-musical output вАФ and which sensor to use. Anchor: **CHI 2026** *Designing Interactive Movement Sonification For Hip-Hop Dance* (+ the CHI'26 Extended-Abstracts workshop *From Movement to Sound and Back*), both 2026-dated venue entries. The thread's interest is the motionвЖТsound *mapping* (sensor-agnostic), which reframes "the body as instrument" away from the camera/MediaPipe the last 3 adult fires leaned on (287/295/302) toward the cheapest, most-private, zero-AI body sensor every phone already has: the **accelerometer** (`devicemotion`), untouched in 300+ prototypes. Honest freshness: strict <30-day cs.SD is still generative audio-AI (carried ¬І303вАУ304); CHI 2026 is the dated named anchor. Chain today's-research вЖТ today's-build = **path (a)**: the winner implements the "use the phone's own motion sensor" hook; the two banked siblings consume ¬І304/prior dives.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the embodied/tactile + falling-motion cluster pulls here вАФ `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП (device-motion play), `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП (falling/raining motion), plus the rhythm/loop loves (`172-loop-station`вЭ§пЄП, `98-kids-drum-circle`вЭ§пЄП) backing the clap sibling. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY + ambition/diversity gates governed.

**Decide вАФ gates cleared**:
- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 306 % 2 = 0, no blocker, no in-progress adult work due (the Mirror-Canon thread's next step is cycle 3, an *adult* candidate queued for 307+). STATE ¬І305 queued cycle 306 as the kids build: ship `299-clap-band` OR `300-blow-sail`. WIDE let me re-validate **both** banked candidates AND add a fresh third (shake) in one fire.
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** вАФ cycle 305 was solo/deepen; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate (three unrelated directions in one fire) вЖТ WIDE. Three **distinct hands-free, non-touch, non-pentatonic** kid experiences via DIFFERENT input axes: clap-onset (mic) / breath (mic) / **shake (devicemotion)**. Pre-allocated 304/305/306; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (Web Audio + mic-analysis / devicemotion + WebGL2, all client-side, nothing recorded/uploaded, no secrets вЖТ no `guard`).
- **Ambition floor** вАФ winner clears **3 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1, devicemotion accelerometer shake-energy) + named-reference(#3, rainstick/maraca) + recent-research(#5, ¬І306 CHI 2026 movement-sonification)`.
  - **(#1) Never-used technique/sensor** вАФ grepped INDEX/READMEs: `devicemotion`/`accelerationIncludingGravity`/shake-energy = **0 prior hits**. `303` and `290` used `deviceorientation` (tilt ќ≤/ќ≥ and heading ќ±) вАФ *orientation*, a different sensor + axis from *acceleration*. The gravity-high-pass + smoothed-energy + threshold-hit detector is a genuine lab-first.
  - **(#3) Named reference** вАФ the **rainstick** (Andean/Chilean) + maraca/shaker tradition; CHI 2026 movement-sonification.
  - **(#5) Recent research** вАФ RESEARCH ¬І306 added THIS fire (CHI 2026), decided the sensor choice.
  - (#2 вЙ•3-subsystems) вАФ shake detector + rainstick/bell synth + WebGL2 particle renderer = 3, but tightly one-instrument; counted the cleaner #1/#3/#5.
- **Diversity audit** (last-10 shipped folders вЙИ {287,290,291,293,295,298,302,303} + the 291/302 in-place deepens; standing JURY over-rep = touch INPUT ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT ¬Ј matte-Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬Ј pentatonic-poke TECHNIQUE ¬Ј additive/glow render ¬Ј kids VIBE[structural]): `diversity: banned=[touch INPUT ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT ¬Ј matte-Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬Ј pentatonic-poke TECHNIQUE ¬Ј additive-glow render ¬Ј kids VIBE(structural)] ¬Ј picked(306)=[devicemotion/shake INPUT ¬Ј raw-WebGL2 matte OUTPUT ¬Ј accelerometer shake-energy TECHNIQUE ¬Ј D-Dorian rainy-day kids VIBE]`. Dodges every banned tag: devicemotion (not touch, a fresh axis vs. 303's tilt), raw-WebGL2 (not three.js/matte-Canvas2D), D-Dorian (not pentatonic). **Curation note:** the builder shipped *additive* point-sprites (against the JURY's anti-glow house style) вАФ I switched the blend to **matte premultiplied alpha-over** (`gl.ONE, gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA`, correct given the frag's premultiplied output) during curation so the winner respects the non-additive ban.

**Mode / orchestration**: WIDE вАФ 3 folder-isolated Builders (304 clap / 305 breath / 306 shake) spawned concurrently, each fully self-contained. I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified from the **actual code + READMEs + an authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (all three again mis-reported some helper files as "already present/seeded" вАФ the recurring memory artifact; the code is genuinely theirs, created 10:10вАУ10:17 during the run).
- **`306-kids-rain-shaker` (WINNER вЖТ shipped)** вАФ see INDEX/README. **Won** on Karel's "massively bigger / move the experience, not the label" mandate + best 06:30 phone-review fit: it's the only candidate built around the phone's OWN sensor (shake the device you're holding вАФ zero permission friction), uses the freshest available input axis (accelerometer shake-energy, never used), and the shake gesture *moves the experience* (a new kid action, not another poke/sing). Ambition 3/5; clean diversity dodge. page.tsx + 3 helpers (shake.ts / rain-audio.ts / rain-gl.ts), iOS-permission + pointer-shake + auto-demo fallbacks, hard limiter (matters most for a shake toy), typography-compliant.
- **`304-kids-clap-band` (re-banked вЖТ IDEAS seed, moved to /tmp, removed from tree)** вАФ clap вЖТ HFC-onset detection (2вАУ8 kHz, adaptive threshold, 160 ms refractory) вЖТ 16-step quantize @96 BPM вЖТ layer woodblock/kick/shaker/bell; D-Mixolydian; Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler; matte raw-WebGL2 SDF band. Build-reviewed clean. **Cleared the floor STRONGEST (3/5: onset #1 + Reich #3 + ¬І304 #5)** and is the no-glow choice. **Didn't win**: "clap вЖТ groove grows" reads close to the lab's existing loopers (the jury's own flag on it) вАФ strong on gates, weaker on experience-novelty than shake. **Now banked a 3rd time (cyc302вЖТ304вЖТ306)** вАФ flagged in MORNING for a definite ship-or-retire decision next kids cycle.
- **`305-kids-blow-sail` (re-banked вЖТ IDEAS seed, moved to /tmp, removed from tree)** вАФ blow вЖТ RMS √Ч spectral-flatness (Wiener entropy, 1вАУ10 kHz) breath/tone discriminator вЖТ wind sails a glowing boat past C-Lydian singing buoys; raw-WebGL2 FBM dawn sea (boat/buoys in-shader). Build-reviewed clean. **Didn't win**: least compositional memory (continuous toy) + weakest floor (2/5). Calm/breath lane to revive.

**Validate**: moved 304 + 305 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` (fallback retention), ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **only 306 present** вЖТ **вЬУ Compiled successfully**, `/dream/306-kids-rain-shaker вЧЛ (Static) 7 kB`, 339/339 static pages, exit 0. First pass surfaced **one ESLint warning** (unused eslint-disable directive at `page.tsx:244` вАФ a non-fatal warning, not an error) вЖТ removed the stray directive (within the one-fix budget) вЖТ re-build **вЬУ exit 0, zero warnings attributable to 306**. All remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code. Losers kept in /tmp (banked as IDEAS text, never half-built folders). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** (no phone sensor / GPU in this sandbox).

**Queued next**:

Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).

All fail safe: the always-on pad keeps it alive, the auto-demo rains hands-free so it self-plays at 06:30, no WebGL2 вЖТ audio still runs.

**What I built (1 commit, deepen-in-place)**:
- **Round вЗД Phase mode toggle** in `302-mirror-canon-round/page.tsx`. Added `CanonMode` + `mode`/`modeRef` state, a `committedAtS` field on each `CanonVoice` (the per-voice drift origin), and `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012`. Playback step 5 now branches: **Round** = the existing locked `barPhase вИТ offset`; **Phase** = each voice loops at `BAR_SEC¬Ј(1 + i¬ЈPHASE_DRIFT)`, clocked from its own commit time, so voice 0 stays locked and later voices slip вАФ Steve Reich *Piano Phase*. The round literally never repeats in Phase.
- **Live drift HUD** вАФ one tinted marker per active voice showing its current loop position (0..1), throttled to ~10 fps via a frame counter (cheap; the canvas keeps its own rAF). In Round the markers hold fixed offsets; in Phase they slide apart вАФ a legible read of the phasing even on Karel's phone.
- A segmented Round/Phase toggle button (44px targets, violet active), mode-aware helper copy, hero + footer updated (added the Reich reference), and the README's multi-cycle section marked cycle 2 **shipped** with cycle 3 (on-hardware tuning + per-voice drift-rate sculpt) queued.

## Cycle 294 вАФ kids build (solo, resurrected bank) вАФ 286-kids-jelly-choir

**When**: 2026-06-03 ~10:20 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch вЖТ `--ff-only` aborts). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` вЖТ HEAD `06e41c1` (cycle 293, `285-mosaic-listener`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Highest committed folder = **285** вЖТ allocated **286** (no collision; 286 was the cycle-292 jelly-choir loser folder, `rm -rf`'d then, so it's free). **AGENT.md drift note (recurring)**: the on-disk AGENT.md is *again* the stale **2026-05-21** version (no AMBITION & DIVERSITY / orchestration sections вАФ the force-push reverted it). Followed the mandate as carried in the cycle brief. Flagged again in MORNING for Karel вАФ worth pinning AGENT.md.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **embodied / squishy-tactile + non-standard-instrument** cluster вАФ `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП, `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (its physical-pluck timbre), `169-kids-marble-run`вЭ§пЄП, `84-wave-fluid`вЭ§пЄП. Jelly Choir sits in this "the instrument is a soft physical thing you deform, not a button" vein, and (like the cycle-292 drum winner) answers the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate at the synthesis level вАФ the sound is literally the wobble.

**Research-first**: this build chains directly off **RESEARCH ¬І292** (real-time physical-modeling / modal synthesis вАФ *nlm*, arXiv 2603.10240 (2026)), the same dive that produced cycle 292's drum. Jelly Choir is the **mass-spring / Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio** branch of that dive (Provot 1995, M√Љller PBD 2007). No new research dive this fire вАФ ¬І292 is < 2 cycles old and still load-bearing; the queue explicitly scheduled this resurrection (research-first rule path (a): a recent dive is the load-bearing idea).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (294 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The cycle-293 STATE queued cycle 294 as *"bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling вАФ `kids-singing-bowl` (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or `kids-jelly-choir` (mass-spring soft-body, SVG)."* Picked **jelly-choir over singing-bowl** on **demo-reliability**: the bowl's signature *requires discovering the circular-rub* (a plain tap gives only a small strike вАФ the flagged "wow needs a learned gesture" risk that sank siblings at 282/289); jelly-choir is **immediate** вАФ poke вЖТ wobble вЖТ sing, zero gesture to learn, exactly the KIDS "immediate response every time" rule. Both are build-verified, non-canvas2d, non-pentatonic.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP). Deliberate: resurrecting an already-build-verified banked piece is a known-green path; the cycle's absolute is *don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled build is the most reliable green-deploy. (Cycle 293 set this solo-when-safer precedent.)

**Ambition floor** вАФ cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references(verified) + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬І292)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped INDEX + READMEs: cymatics only *draw* membranes; Karplus is strings; `284` is a *membrane* modal synth. **First mass-spring / Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio instrument in 280+ prototypes** (the deformation energy of a sprung point-mass ring drives the voice).
- **(3) Named references (verified)** вАФ README cites nlm (arXiv 2603.10240, 2026), Provot 1995, M√Љller et al. PBD 2007 вАФ all real & checkable.
- **(2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ 4: Verlet soft-body physics (radial + structural springs, 2 substeps √Ч 3 constraint iters, multi-touch pinning) ¬Ј deformation-energy вЖТ synth mapping (e¬≤вЖТgain, eвЖТlowpass, eвЖТvibrato depth/rate) ¬Ј per-voice Web Audio (sine + triangle octave + LFO vibrato вЖТ energy-gated gain вЖТ lowpass вЖТ limiter, always-on drone) ¬Ј inline-SVG render (Catmull-RomвЖТB√©zier blob bodies, Gaussian-blur glow, energy-driven mouths, harmony glow lines).
- **(5) Recent research** вАФ built off ¬І292's physical-modeling dive (< 2 cycles old).
- (4) Multi-cycle вАФ not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: true eigenmode partials, real inter-blob collision, tilt gravity).

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 271,272,275,276,279,280,283,284,285):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√Ч: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬Ј three.js-additive-points/glow(JURY hard-ban) ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬Ј picked=[touch poke/drag INPUT ¬Ј inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬Ј mass-spring/Verlet soft-bodyвЖТaudio TECHNIQUE(0√Ч ever) ¬Ј squishy candy/kids VIBE ¬Ј just-intonation SOUND (non-pentatonic)]`
- **OUTPUT = inline SVG**: canvas2d hit **5√Ч** (271,272,275,279,280) вЖТ **BANNED**; SVG only 2√Ч in window (268 not in last-10, 276) вЖТ **under the line, clean dodge**; SVG also needs no GPU (lowest render risk). three.js was 2√Ч (283,284) вАФ also legal, but the bowl sibling (three.js) would push it to 3√Ч and carries the demo risk above.
- **INPUT = touch poke/drag**: touch in last-10 = 272,284 (+268 just outside) вЖТ ~2вАУ3√Ч, under the ban line. Core 4-yo modality; the real diversification this cycle is again the SOUND.
- **TECHNIQUE = mass-spring/Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio**: **0√Ч ever** вЖТ cleanest possible dodge.
- **SOUND = just intonation** (1/1¬Ј9/8¬Ј5/4¬Ј3/2¬Ј2/1 over 196 Hz): C-pentatonic **banned** вЖТ JI is consonant but categorically non-pentatonic.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First mass-spring / Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio instrument in 280+ prototypes** вАФ the voice is driven by the *deformation energy* of a physically-sprung blob, not a tap trigger.
2. **"The sound is the wobble"** вАФ energy¬≤вЖТloudness means a jelly is silent at rest and shimmers exactly as much as it's jiggling; a brand-new control intimacy for the kids zone.
3. **Two-finger / two-kid harmony** вАФ poke two jellies вЖТ a pure JI interval rings out with a glowing thread between them (KIDS.md social-bonding value).
4. **Pure inline-SVG** вАФ dodges the canvas2d 5√Ч ban *and* is the lowest-risk render path (no GPU, always renders) for a 06:30 demo on any device.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вЖТ `npm run build`: first pass failed on a TypeScript error вАФ React's `feGaussianBlur` JSX prop is **`stdDeviation`**, not the raw SVG attribute `stdDev`. ONE fix = rename the attribute. Rebuild вЖТ **exit 0**, "вЬУ Compiled successfully in 26.4s", `/dream/286-kids-jelly-choir вЧЛ Static **3.57 kB**`, no errors (only pre-existing warnings in non-dream `src/lib/*`). Pre-empted the usual traps before the first build: no `function use*` non-hook helpers (`blobPath` / `Eyes` named safely), no bare `any` (the `webkitAudioContext` access is a scoped `as unknown as {вА¶}` cast), no non-null assertions in the audio graph (captured `masterNode`/`limiterNode` locals), refs-not-state in the rAF loop, single `useEffect` with full teardown (oscillators stopped+disconnected, AudioContext closed, listeners + rAF removed). Build-verified, **not** browser-verified live this fire.

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 295: **adult build** (295 % 2 = 1). README lists the path.

Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (no three.js needed вАФ SVG).
- **Honesty carry-forward**: `286` is build-verified but **not browser-verified live** this fire (no browser in the cycle; solo). Unverified risks: (a) **spring tuning** вАФ the constraint factors (K_RADIAL 0.16 / K_STRUCT 0.14 / DAMPING 0.93, 2 substeps √Ч 3 iters) are hand-set, untested for feel; worst case the wobble is too stiff or too floppy (a one-number tweak next fire), never an error. (b) **grab radius** вАФ pointer pins the nearest perimeter mass of the nearest jelly within `r¬Ј1.7`; on a very dense/small layout a poke could grab a neighbor jelly вАФ still musical, just maybe the wrong color. (c) **mouth path** вАФ the smiling-open-mouth quadratic is geometry I couldn't eyeball; if it reads oddly it's a 2-line fix. All fail safe: the always-on drone keeps it alive, SVG always renders (no GPU), and any poke produces an immediate wobble even if audio failed to start.

## Cycle 293 вАФ adult build (solo) вАФ 285-mosaic-listener

Highest committed folder = **284** вЖТ allocated **285** for this build (no collision). **AGENT.md drift note**: the on-disk AGENT.md is again the stale **2026-05-21** version (no AMBITION & DIVERSITY MANDATE / orchestration sections) вАФ the force-push reverted it. Followed the mandate as carried in the cycle brief (ambition floor вЙ•2/5 ¬Ј diversity audit bans tags вЙ•4√Ч in last 10 ¬Ј research-first 15-min dive). Flagging for Karel вАФ this drift recurs every force-push; worth pinning AGENT.md.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): pulled by the **his-own-music / data-sculpture cluster** вАФ `163-paths-visualizer`вЭ§пЄП (the `/api/audio/:id` track-id read this piece reuses for the corpus), `227-paths-granular`вЭ§пЄП (grain-based playback of his piano вАФ the nearest cousin), `243-spectral-cloud`вЭ§пЄП, `153-paint-compose`вЭ§пЄП, `86-sound-to-video`вЭ§пЄП. Mosaic Listener sits dead-center: it slices his real Welcome Home recording into a navigable grain corpus, deepening the loved granular/paths vein toward a genuinely new synthesis paradigm (concatenative, not granular-of-live-input).

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH ¬І293, 2026-06-03 вАФ web tools healthy): **corpus-based concatenative synthesis / audio mosaicing**, chosen to load-bear the build. Anchors: **CataRT** (Diemo Schwarz, IRCAM вАФ descriptor-space + KNN "play the cloud", foundational); **"The Concatenator," arXiv 2411.04366 (Nov 2024)** (real-time Bayesian musaicing); **Lee & Pasquier, "MACAT/MACataRT," arXiv 2502.00023 (Feb 2025)** (factor-oracle self-listening agent вАФ the deepen path); **FluCoMa "live audio mosaicing on the web"** (browser-feasibility freshness anchor). Chain dive вЖТ build is direct (research-first path (a)): ¬І293 вЖТ `285-mosaic-listener`.

**Decided**: Adult cycle (293 % 2 = 1). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The queue named `mosaic-listener` as **"the strongest single bank in the queue вАФ schedule it on the next clean-slate adult cycle,"** and this is that cycle. **Rejected the other queued candidates after a prior-art grep**: `5-arcs` ("Journey Arc Engine v2") + `48-arc-compose` **already implement an "EDM Build-and-Drop" / cinematic / ritual arc**, so the journey-engine-alternative direction would be a near-duplicate (the exact "too similar" trap the mandate bans); `271-pigment-mosaic` already shipped the **AI-image-inside-AV** piece (Karel's #1, no longer a 0√Ч gap, and the FAL_KEY/no-browser-verify risk is real for an autonomous cycle). `mosaic-listener` is the clean clear-slate pick: a genuinely new synthesis paradigm + bullseye on the "use his real piano" directive.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP orchestration). Deliberate: the absolute rule is *the build must pass / don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled, fully-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy path in budget вАФ especially with **raw WebGL2** shaders I can't browser-verify this cycle. Made the piece rich (4 subsystems) to honor the "not a thin solo toy" spirit. (Cycle 290 set this solo precedent and it held.)

**Ambition floor** вАФ cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references(verified) + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬І293)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped INDEX + all dream READMEs for `concatenative`/`corpus-based`/`catart`/`audio mosaic`/`timbre-space`: **zero hits вЖТ first concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece in 280+ prototypes.** (`227-paths-granular` is *granular* playback of a single source position; this is *descriptor-matched KNN concatenation* across a tagged corpus вАФ a different paradigm.)
- **(3) Named references (verified)** вАФ README cites CataRT/Diemo Schwarz, The Concatenator (arXiv 2411.04366, 2024), MACAT/MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023, 2025), FluCoMa вАФ all real & checkable.
- **(2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ 4: corpus analysis (grain segmentation + RMS + 256-pt Hann-DFT spectral centroid + ZCR pitch, with synth-corpus *and* real-track-decode paths sharing one buffer-index playback) ¬Ј descriptor-space KNN matcher + Chris-Wilson look-ahead grain scheduler (overlap-add windowed BufferSources вЖТ lowpass вЖТ feedback-delay wash вЖТ limiter) ¬Ј matte WebGL2 atlas render (GL_POINTS, per-grain activation, cursor + trail) ¬Ј target navigation (pointer-drag / auto-drift Lissajous / mic centroid+RMS).
- **(5) Recent research** вАФ built directly off this cycle's ¬І293 dive.
- (4) Multi-cycle вАФ not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: YIN+MFCC, PCA/UMAP layout, KD-tree, onset-aligned grains, MACataRT factor-oracle).

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283,284):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√Ч: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬Ј three.js-additive-points/glow(JURY hard-ban) ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬Ј picked=[pointer-drag INPUT (mic optional) ¬Ј matte raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬Ј concatenative-synthesis TECHNIQUE(0√Ч ever) ¬Ј data-sculpture/his-piano VIBE ¬Ј his-real-piano-grains SOUND (non-pentatonic by source)]`
- **OUTPUT = raw WebGL2 (matte)**: canvas2d hit **5√Ч** вЖТ **BANNED**; three.js 3√Ч (267,283,284 вАФ under the line but the JURY *additionally* hard-bans glowing three.js point clouds, which a descriptor scatter would read as); SVG 2√Ч (268,276); **raw-WebGL2 0√Ч in window** вЖТ cleanest dodge on *both* axes. Used normal premultiplied-alpha blending (matte, no additive) to also satisfy the anti-glow mandate.
- **INPUT = pointer-drag** (primary; mic optional): mic is borderline (3вАУ4√Ч depending on how the multi-source 271/283 are classified) so I kept it optional and made drag-the-cloud the core embodied interaction вАФ the CataRT signature gesture and the most demo-reliable (works on Karel's desktop with no permission). Touch-tap was 3√Ч (268,272,284), under the line.
- **TECHNIQUE = concatenative synthesis**: 0√Ч ever вЖТ cleanest possible dodge.
- **SOUND**: when the corpus is his real piano the pitches are literally his playing вЖТ non-pentatonic by source, dodging the C-pentatonic ban without choosing any scale.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece in 280+ prototypes** вАФ a new synthesis paradigm for the lab (descriptor-space KNN grain concatenation), not a new palette on an old technique.
2. **You "play his recording with your finger"** вАФ dragging through the timbre atlas re-assembles his Welcome Home piano out of shards; it's never a literal playback.
3. **A clean dodge of both bans at once** вАФ matte raw-WebGL2 escapes the canvas2d ban *and* the JURY glowing-points ban (normal-blend matte dots).
4. **Direct researchвЖТbuild chain, same fire** вАФ ¬І293's "browser mosaicing is feasible now" IS the load-bearing feasibility argument; the build follows CataRT's exact paradigm.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вЖТ `npm run build`: first pass compiled (TypeScript вЬУ) but ESLint failed on `prefer-const` for two KNN accumulator arrays I mutate-but-never-reassign (`best`/`bestD`). ONE fix = `let`вЖТ`const`. Rebuild вЖТ **exit 0**, "вЬУ Compiled successfully in 29.1s", `/dream/285-mosaic-listener вЧЛ Static **6.28 kB**`, no errors (only pre-existing warnings in non-dream `src/lib/*`). Also pre-empted two known traps before the first build: removed an unused CPU `hsv` helper (color is done in GLSL), and swapped an O(N¬Јlag) autocorrelation pitch detector for a cheap O(N) zero-crossing estimate + a dynamic analysis hop, so slicing a multi-minute real track stays sub-second. Build-verified (not browser-verified live вАФ see honesty note).

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 294: **kids build** (294 % 2 = 0). Bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling from cycle 292 вАФ **`kids-singing-bowl`** (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or **`kids-jelly-choir`** (mass-spring soft-body, SVG) вАФ both build-verified; or push physical modeling further (a *playable* plate/Chladni, a struck metal tongue-drum). - Cycle 295: **adult build**. Strong leftover banks: **`motif-memory`** (symbolic transcription вЖТ re-performance вАФ upgrade to YIN first, per its README) or **`281-midi-harmonograph`** (Web MIDI, pianist fit, raw-WebGL2). Avoid another arc engine (5-arcs/48 cover it), another AI-image piece (271), 4th "fly through your music" + 5th emergent-CA (JURY-frozen).
- **DEEPEN 285 (multi-cycle)**: real YIN pitch + MFCC timbre descriptors; PCA/UMAP 2-D layout so the atlas clusters by character; a KD-tree for thousands of grains at framerate; onset-aligned grains (AudioWorklet); a **MACataRT factor-oracle** so it continues a phrase rather than only chasing the cursor; drag *two* targets to morph regions; record a target gesture and loop it. README lists the path.
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: STATE.md top is now consistently prepended (286/287/288/291/292/293) but cycles 280вАУ285 + 289/290 still sit appended at the END; INDEX "Newest/Previous" chain skips some mid-200s + 279/280. Worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard` needed** вАФ `285` only READS the existing `/api/audio/:id` (no side effects, the loved-`163` pattern) + Web Audio + WebGL2, otherwise fully client-side. Mic is analysis-only (`AnalyserNode`, never connected to destination, never recorded/persisted/transmitted). Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (raw WebGL2, no three.js needed).
- **Honesty carry-forward**: `285` is build-verified but **not browser-verified live** this fire (no browser in the cycle; solo, raw WebGL2). Unverified risks: (a) the raw-WebGL2 shader path вАФ mitigated by a no-WebGL rose-notice fallback that keeps the audio mosaic playing, and a dead-simple single-program points pipeline (default VAO, premultiplied-alpha blend); (b) whether the pointerвЖТatlas inverse mapping lands exactly under the cursor (it inverts the vertex shader's `pos*1.78-0.89` + aspect scale analytically, but is unverified visually) вАФ worst case the dragged target is slightly offset, still musical; (c) decode/analyze time on a long real track вАФ bounded by the dynamic hop (вЙ§~1240 windows) so analysis stays sub-second. The procedural-corpus default + auto-drift guarantee a working, self-playing 06:30 review with zero network and zero permissions.

## Cycle 292 вАФ kids build (WIDE orchestration, 3 explored) вАФ 284-kids-thunder-drum

**When**: 2026-06-03 ~06:15 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch; shallow clone вЖТ `--ff-only` aborts). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` вЖТ HEAD `4e13376` (cycle 291, `283-piano-isosurface`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds. Highest committed folder = **283** вЖТ pre-allocated **284/285/286** for the three builders (no collision).

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **embodied / sensorimotor + non-standard-instrument** cluster вАФ `83-kids-tilt-rain`вЭ§пЄП, `140-kids-string-bridge`вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вЭ§пЄП, `105-pluck-field`вЭ§пЄП (its KS/physical-pluck timbre), `166-kids-lantern`вЭ§пЄП. The winner (strike a real drum *skin* and feel its physics) sits in this "the instrument is a physical thing you act on, not a button" vein, and is the deepest answer yet to the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate.

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH ¬І292, 2026-06-03 вАФ web tools healthy): **real-time physical-modeling / modal synthesis**. Anchor: *nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max* (**arXiv 2603.10240, March 2026**) вАФ playable real-time modal synthesis of strings, **membranes, and plates**, with non-linear (tension/amplitude-dependent) behavior. Foundational cross-refs: circular-membrane **Bessel modes** (Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound*, 1877), tympani **tension-nonlinearity pitch-glide** (Morrison & Rossing), **stick-slip friction** excitation (In√°cio/Antunes/Wright 2008), mass-spring/Verlet **soft-body** (Provot 1995 / M√Љller PBD). Surprise/hook: the lab has 130+ kids instruments but their voice is almost always a **Karplus pluck / triangle bell / additive sine in C-major pentatonic** вАФ and modal synthesis attacks that at the root: you choose a *physical object*, and its eigenmodes are inharmonic/**non-pentatonic by physics**, with a body-level "hit harder вЖТ it bends" intuition a 4-yo already has. Grep confirmed the gap: cymatics (`19`,`165`) only *draw* Chladni/Bessel (visualizers, not playable); Karplus is waveguide *strings*; **zero playable membrane/plate modal synths, zero friction/stick-slip, zero mass-springвЖТaudio** in the lab. Chain dive вЖТ build is direct: ¬І292 вЖТ three WIDE briefs (membrane / bowl / jelly) вЖТ shipped `284-kids-thunder-drum` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (292 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The standing JURY (2026-06-02) demand is *"audit the SOUND вАФ the most monotonous axis; force a non-pentatonic mode; ban the glow/pentatonic."* Recent kids fires broadened the *tuning* (slendro `268`, JI-beating `272`, BohlenвАУPierce `276`, Lydian `280`) вАФ this cycle goes one level deeper and broadens the **synthesis method itself** (physical modeling), where the non-pentatonic pitches fall out of the physics rather than a chosen scale. The live **diversity audit BANS canvas2d-output (5√Ч)**, so all three briefs use non-canvas2d output.

**Mode**: **WIDE** (research anchor opened three orthogonal physical objects; JURY "audit/diversify the sound" вЖТ go WIDE with fresh tags; alternation: 288 WIDE вЖТ 290 WIDE вЖТ 291 WIDE вЖТ keep diversifying since the jury is still flagging convergence, not asking to DEEPEN one piece). Three briefs = three physical objects √Ч three never-used techniques √Ч three non-canvas2d outputs, all non-pentatonic:
- `284-kids-thunder-drum` вАФ **touch strike** ¬Ј **three.js** Bessel-mode membrane mesh ¬Ј **non-linear modal membrane synthesis** (tension pitch-glide). **вЖР WINNER.**
- `285-kids-singing-bowl` вАФ **touch circular-rub** ¬Ј **three.js** metallic bowl + cymatic water ¬Ј **friction/stick-slip modal excitation** (sustain-by-gesture).
- `286-kids-jelly-choir` вАФ **touch poke/squish** ¬Ј **inline SVG** wobble blobs ¬Ј **mass-spring/Verlet soft-body вЖТ audio** (JI harmony).

**Ambition floor** вАФ winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-reference + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬І292)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped READMEs+INDEX: cymatics only *draw* membrane modes; Karplus is strings. **First playable membrane / non-linear modal synth in 280+ prototypes.** The pitches are Bessel eigenmodes (inharmonic, non-pentatonic by physics); the tension pitch-glide is the non-linear part of the research anchor.
- **(3) Named reference** вАФ README cites **nlm (arXiv 2603.10240, 2026)** + **Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound* (1877)** + **Morrison & Rossing (tympani nonlinearity)**.
- **(2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ 4: multi-touch strike (position + pseudo-velocity) input ¬Ј per-strike Bessel-mode displacement on the three.js mesh (viz) ¬Ј 8-partial non-linear modal audio synth bank with per-mode decay + tension detune ¬Ј three.js render (lights, glow rings, always-on drone).
- **(5) Recent research** вАФ built directly off this cycle's ¬І292 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 264,267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√Ч: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬Ј picked=[touch-strike INPUT ¬Ј three.js OUTPUT ¬Ј non-linear modal membrane synthesis TECHNIQUE(0√Ч ever) ¬Ј matte/organic kids VIBE ¬Ј JI-spread Bessel-eigenmode SOUND (non-pentatonic)]`
- **OUTPUT = three.js**: canvas2d hit **5√Ч** (271,272,275,279,280) вЖТ **BANNED**; three.js only 2√Ч (267,283), SVG 2√Ч (268,276), raw-WebGL 1√Ч (264) вАФ all under the line. All three briefs avoided canvas2d (284/285 three.js, 286 SVG).
- **INPUT**: no modality вЙ•4 (touch 3√Ч [264,268,272], mic 3√Ч [275,280,283], audio-file ~2√Ч, tilt 1√Ч, external-API 1√Ч) вЖТ touch is *under* the ban line at 3; chosen as the core 4-yo modality (last two kids inputs were tilt `276` + mic `280`, so touch rotates back in cleanly). The real diversification this cycle is the **sound engine**, which is the axis the JURY says nobody audits.
- **TECHNIQUE**: physical-modeling / modal synthesis = **0√Ч ever** вЖТ cleanest possible dodge.
- **VIBE**: kids 5√Ч (264,268,272,276,280) вЖТ forced (even cycle); diversified *inside* the kids zone via a wholly new synthesis method + new visual paradigm (membrane ripple).
- **SOUND** (the JURY's demanded axis): C-pentatonic вЖТ **banned**; all three briefs forced non-pentatonic (Bessel eigenmodes / inharmonic bell partials / just intonation). Winner's pitches are physical eigenmodes вАФ the deepest break.

**Orchestration**: spawned 3 Builder subagents in parallel (single message), folder-isolated (284/285/286 pre-allocated), each fully self-contained (per-object concept + algorithm; audio-visual-only / self-contained / degrade-gracefully constraints; the per-brief mandatory non-canvas2d output; KIDS design rules; typography rules; the exact GitHub design-notes URL; the build-trap list incl. unused-vars, `use*`-named-helper hook trap, un-disabled `any`, the `Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer>` getByte* cast trap, refs-not-state rAF, one-`useEffect` teardown; and the no-git / no-shared-docs limits). All three returned demoable + README, each self-reporting tsc+eslint clean (286's builder fixed an engine `useEffect` that depended on `[started,hint]` and tore down the whole audio graph when the hint faded вАФ removed `hint` from deps; 285's builder noted a transient ENOENT during page-data that cleared on the clean re-run). I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (`"use client"` line 1 ¬Ј **no `getContext("2d")`** anywhere ¬Ј 284/285 `three`, 286 inline-SVG ¬Ј no `function use*` non-hook helpers ¬Ј no bare `any` ¬Ј each design-notes link points at its OWN README ¬Ј no API route), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** вЖТ **exit 0** (honest banking: both losers genuinely compile + emit their routes вАФ 285 `3.89 kB`), then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only вЖТ **"вЬУ Compiled successfully in 27.8s"**, `284-kids-thunder-drum вЧЛ Static 3.69 kB`.

**Winner = `284-kids-thunder-drum`.** All three cleared the floor and dodged every banned tag; decider = **ambition √Ч surprise √Ч demo-reliability √Ч directive-fit**:
- **Most demo-reliable at 06:30** вАФ a satisfying boom on the *first tap* with zero gesture to learn. (285's signature *requires discovering* the circular-rub вАФ a plain tap gives only a small strike вАФ the same "wow needs a learned gesture/setup" risk that lost siblings in 282/289.)
- **Most novel / surprising SOUND + deepest JURY answer** вАФ the only one using the *non-linear* half of the research anchor: the tension pitch-glide "bwooOOWww" is the cleanest "huh, I didn't know we could do that," and eigenmodes-not-a-scale is the deepest possible answer to "audit the sound."
- **Most visceral for a 4-yo** вАФ drumming is the most primal kid instrument; three.js membrane-ripple ties the visual directly to the modal sound.
- Both runners-up **build-verified** (all-three build, exit 0) and banked number-free in IDEAS.md (`kids-singing-bowl` friction/stick-slip + `kids-jelly-choir` mass-spring soft-body).

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First playable physical-modeling / non-linear modal-synthesis instrument in 280+ prototypes** вАФ the pitches are circular-membrane Bessel **eigenmodes** (inharmonic, non-pentatonic by physics), not a chosen scale.
2. **First tension pitch-glide** вАФ strike velocity bends all partials sharp then relaxes them over 120вАУ260 ms (the tympani/thunder-drum "bwooOOWww"); the non-linear part of the ¬І292 anchor.
3. **Strike position = timbre** вАФ center hits excite low axisymmetric modes (round boom), rim hits the higher modes (bright slap), mirrored by a travelling rim-pinned membrane ripple that displaces the three.js mesh.
4. **Direct researchвЖТbuild chain, same fire** вАФ ¬І292's physical-modeling dive IS the winner's load-bearing idea, and it answers the JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate at the synthesis-method level (deeper than the recent tuning-only breaks at 272/276/280).

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 293: **adult build** (293 % 2 = 1). Resurrect a banked non-winner now that canvas2d should start to unban: **`281-midi-harmonograph`** (harmonograph + JI, pianist fit, raw-WebGL2 вАФ canvas-free, shippable any cycle), **`282-ensemble-tabs`** (first networked piece), or **`mosaic-listener`** (first concatenative synthesis, canvas2d вАФ wait for unban). OR the JURY's standing ask: **AI-image-INSIDE-an-AV-piece** (his stated #1, still 0√Ч in 15) or **extend `259-paths-generative`** (long-form/memory). Avoid a 4th "fly through your music" + 5th emergent-CA (JURY-frozen).
- Cycle 294: **kids build**. Bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling вАФ **`kids-singing-bowl`** (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or **`kids-jelly-choir`** (mass-spring soft-body, SVG) вАФ both build-verified this fire; or push physical modeling further (a **plate/Chladni *playable* instrument**, or a struck **metal tongue-drum**). Keep diversifying the SOUND; rotate input/output against whatever the audit bans that cycle.
- **DEEPEN 284 (multi-cycle)**: coupled-mode solver (energy exchange between partials вЖТ truer transient); amplitude-dependent damping; a tympani-style "pitch pedal" drag-to-retune gesture; a shell/air-cavity resonance under the membrane. README lists the path.
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: STATE.md ordering is consistent at the top now (286/287/288/291/292 prepended) but cycles 280вАУ285 + 289/290 still sit appended at the END; INDEX.md "Newest/Previous" chain skips some mid-200s + 279/280. Worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard` needed** вАФ `284` is Web Audio + three.js, entirely client-side; no network, no mic, no camera, no server, no secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (three.js ^0.182 already installed).
- **WIDE-curation discipline held** вАФ built **all 3 present first** (exit 0 вАФ confirms both losers genuinely `вЧЛ Static` + emit routes, so banking is honest) then winner-only (exit 0). Three folder-isolated builders wrote concurrently with zero conflict; none touched git or shared docs; I (orchestrator) alone committed. Loser folders 285/286 `rm -rf`'d, never committed вЖТ free again; committed folder this cycle = **284** only.
- **Diversity audit was load-bearing** вАФ it forced all three outputs off the over-represented canvas2d; the kids zone's monotony is the *sound*, so the WIDE fire put three never-used synthesis methods in play and shipped the one whose sound is most novel.
- **Honest carry-forward**: `284` is build-verified but not *browser-verified* live this fire. Risks (in README): (a) the per-strike modal voice is a sine bank, not a coupled-mode solver, so the attack transient is approximate (still reads as a struck skin); (b) "velocity" is derived from inter-tap timing / drag, not real pressure вАФ a single deliberate tap reads as medium-hard, so the glide is always *present* but its dynamic range is coarse. Both fail safe: the always-on drone keeps it alive, and any tap produces an immediate satisfying boom.

Mic is analysis-only (never routed to destination, never recorded). Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (three.js ^0.182 already installed).

Mandate working as intended.

Risks (documented in README): (a) marching-cubes resolution 48 polygonizes on the CPU each frame вАФ fluid on a laptop, a very busy mix could dip on a weak phone GPU (one-line res drop fixes it); (b) the bandвЖТmetaball + centroidвЖТhue mappings are hand-tuned, so a dense orchestral mix may want different gains than solo piano. Both fail safe: the always-on synth pad keeps the form alive regardless of source.

## Cycle 288 вАФ kids build (WIDE orchestration) вАФ 276-kids-balloon-tritave

**When**: 2026-06-02 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` вЖТ HEAD `7a34357` (cycle 287, `275-memory-loom`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT вЖТ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds. Highest committed folder = 275; banked seed-names 273/274 reserve no numbers (folders rm'd, free) вЖТ pre-allocated **276/277/278** for the three builders (no collision).

**Love signal** (`curl вА¶/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **calm/contemplative + non-standard-instrument** cluster вАФ `140-kids-string-bridge` вЭ§пЄП, `133-kids-ripple-pond` вЭ§пЄП, `166-kids-lantern` вЭ§пЄП, `105-pluck-field` вЭ§пЄП, `107-ocean-presence` вЭ§пЄП вАФ plus the cut-paper/SVG register the lab leaned into at loved-adjacent `268-kids-shadow-theater`. The winner (a calm, matte tilt-and-drift balloon sky in an alien-but-consonant tuning) sits squarely in this quiet, parent-tolerable vein the KIDS.md market-gap analysis stakes out, not the high-energy tap-chime vein.

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH.md ¬І288, 2026-06-02 вАФ web tools healthy): **non-octave tuning вАФ the BohlenвАУPierce scale**. Sources: Xenharmonic Wiki + Elaine Walker/ZIA + Wikipedia (BP independently discovered by **Heinz Bohlen 1972** and **Max Mathews & John R. Pierce**, Bell Labs ~1984); freshness anchor that it's a *live* scene not a museum piece: *"A huge online gallery of microtonal music to listen to"* (The Microtone Fox, **Medium, May 2026**) + Elaine Walker's forthcoming BP album; timbre cross-ref = the active 2025вАУ2026 interactive-resonator literature. Surprise/hook: every pitched piece in 280+ prototypes вАФ pentatonic, slendro, Hindustani JI, whole-tone вАФ still repeats at the **2:1 octave**; BP throws the octave out, repeating at the **tritave (3:1)** in **13 equal steps** (`3^(1/13)вЙИ1.0882`, ~146¬Ґ), engineered around odd-harmonic chords (the **3:5:7 triad**, clarinet affinity). It sounds in-tune yet alien вАФ the purest "huh, I didn't know we could do that" sound the lab can offer, and a 4-year-old has no theory to unlearn. Chain today's research вЖТ today's build is direct: ¬І288 вЖТ WIDE brief A вЖТ shipped `276-kids-balloon-tritave` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (288 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The standing JURY (2026-06-02) demand is *"audit the SOUND вАФ the lab's most monotonous axis; force a non-pentatonic mode."* Recent kids fires already broadened the sound (slendro `268`, JI-beating `272`, banked raga/polyrhythm). **Deliberately did NOT ship the queued banked `274-kids-clay-clock`** вАФ the live diversity audit (below) bans both **touch-input** AND **canvas2d-output** this cycle, and clay-clock is touch + canvas2d. The mandate says the diversity audit is a hard gate and "stop resurrecting the path of least resistance," so I picked a fresh direction that dodges the banned tags instead. (Path (a): build implements today's research hook.)

**Mode**: **WIDE** (alternation: 286 WIDE вЖТ 287 DEEP вЖТ **288 WIDE**; and JURY's "audit/diversify the sound" = go WIDE with fresh tags. Also: never solo kids вЖТ orchestrate). Three briefs = three unrelated non-pentatonic kids SOUND worlds, each with a *different* non-banned input AND output:
- `276-kids-balloon-tritave` вАФ **TILT** + **SVG** + **BohlenвАУPierce non-octave tuning** (the novel-technique reading).
- `277-kids-overtone-cave` вАФ **MIC** + **raw-WebGL** + **harmonic-series overtone singing** (khoomei/Lucier reading).
- `278-kids-dream-flock` вАФ **CAMERA frame-diff** + **SVG** + **whole-tone / Debussy** boids flock (the dream-cloud reading).

**Ambition floor** вАФ winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-reference + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research(¬І288)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped INDEX + all READMEs for `bohlen`/`tritave`/`non-octave`: **zero hits вЖТ first non-octave tuning in 280+ prototypes.** Every prior pitched piece (incl. slendro `268`, JI `272`, whole-tone shepard-tones) repeats at the 2:1 octave; BP repeats at the 3:1 tritave. (Note: modal/Karplus synthesis and MediaPipe/WebGPU/breath were all checked and are already used вАФ so the novelty is specifically the *tuning system*, not the synth/sensor.)
- **(3) Named reference** вАФ README cites the **BohlenвАУPierce scale**: Heinz Bohlen (1972) + Max Mathews & John R. Pierce (Bell Labs ~1984) + Elaine Walker (ZIA), with the clarinet/odd-harmonic affinity.
- **(2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ 4 distinct: `DeviceOrientation` tilt input + gravity-drift physics (with mouse fallback) ¬Ј inline-SVG cut-paper render/animation engine (rAF via refs, feDropShadow + feTurbulence) ¬Ј odd-harmonic clarinet-like BP additive synth + root/tritave drone ¬Ј frame-based creatureвЖФballoon brush-collision (chords on simultaneous brush).
- **(5) Recent research** вАФ built directly off this cycle's ¬І288 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 258,259,260,262,264,267,268,271,272,275):
`diversity: banned=[touch-input(4√Ч: 260,264,268,272) ¬Ј canvas2d-output(4√Ч: 259,271,272,275) ¬Ј three.js-additive-points(JURY) ¬Ј C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬Ј picked=[tilt input ¬Ј SVG output ¬Ј BohlenвАУPierce non-octave tuning technique ¬Ј matte cut-paper kids vibe ¬Ј non-pentatonic/non-octave SOUND]`
- INPUT: touch √Ч4 (260,264,268,272) вЖТ **BANNED**; mic √Ч2 (271,275), camera √Ч1 (258), audio-file √Ч3 (259,267,+271), external-API √Ч1 (262), tilt **0√Ч** in last 10. Picked **tilt** (cleanest dodge; last tilt was 253 at #11).

Picked **SVG** (under line, continues the loved-268 register). The three briefs spread output across SVG / raw-WebGL / SVG вАФ none used canvas2d or three.js.

**Winner = `276-kids-balloon-tritave`.** All three cleared the floor and dodged every banned tag; the decider was **ambition √Ч surprise √Ч demo-reliability**:
- **Highest ambition (4/5) вАФ the only one clearing *novel-technique*.** First non-octave tuning in 280+ prototypes; it answers the JURY "audit the sound" mandate at the deepest possible level (it changes the *repeat interval itself*, not merely the scale). 277 (3/5) and 278 (2вАУ3/5) are fresh SOUNDS but additive synthesis / whole-tone already exist in the lab.

- **On-brand** вАФ matte cut-paper SVG continues the loved `268-kids-shadow-theater` register; contemplative/calm per KIDS.md.
- Both runners-up **build-verified** and banked number-free in IDEAS.md (`277-kids-overtone-cave` + `278-kids-dream-flock`).

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First non-octave / BohlenвАУPierce tuning in the lab** вАФ the repeat interval is the tritave (3:1), not the octave; the deepest break yet of the lab's most monotonous axis (the JURY's standing "audit the sound" ask).

Surprise/hook: the heavyweight 2026 frontier (latent-diffusion co-performance) needs a remote GPU and isn't browser-feasible, but the **memory architecture** under it runs zero-dep in Web Audio вАФ and the cheapest version is the most personal: the instrument becomes literally *made of the player's own sound*. The literature offers three memory representations (verbatim audio / grain corpus / symbolic notes) вЖТ became this cycle's DEEP fan-out. One massive concept вАФ *"a piece that LISTENS to you play, REMEMBERS what you played, and REWRITES its own structure over 10 min"* вАФ attacked via **three different memory representations**:
- `275-memory-loom` вАФ **verbatim audio capture** вЖТ incommensurate loop bank + state machine (Frippertronics/Eno).
- `276-mosaic-listener` вАФ **grain corpus** tagged by descriptors вЖТ concatenative navigation (CataRT/MACataRT).
- `277-motif-memory` вАФ **symbolic note transcription** вЖТ Markov + transformational re-performance (Lewis *Voyager* / Rowe *Cypher*).

**Ambition floor** вАФ winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references + вЙ•3-subsystems + recent-research`
- **(1) Novel technique** вАФ grepped INDEX + READMEs: loops existed (`172`) and granular (`227`), but **live audio-capture-into-the-loop-bank (recording you in real time) / a self-listening Frippertronics architecture has never appeared** in 270+ prototypes. First of its kind.
- **(3) Named references** вАФ README cites **Eno & Fripp** *Frippertronics* / *(No Pussyfooting)* (1973) + *Music for Airports* (1978) and **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening*.
- **(2) вЙ•3 subsystems** вАФ 4 distinct: mic-capture listener (ring buffer + 2-threshold RMS onset/release phrase slicer) ¬Ј incommensurate 7-loop memory bank (per-voice LFO + transposition + pan + procedural convolution reverb + shared lowpass + limiter) ¬Ј long-form generative movement state machine (decaying-memory displacement) ¬Ј Canvas2D loom viz. Plus tri-modal source (mic/file/`/api/audio` track-id/synth).
- **(5) Recent research** вАФ built directly off this cycle's ¬І287 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 by cycle = 272,271,268,267,264,262,260,259,258,256):
`diversity: banned=[touch-input(4√Ч: 272,268,264,260) ¬Ј kids-vibe(5√Ч: 272,268,264,260,258)] ¬Ј picked=[mic + audio-file input ¬Ј canvas2d output ¬Ј live-capture-looping + generative-state-machine technique ¬Ј ambient/long-form adult-meditative vibe]`
- INPUT: touch √Ч4 вЖТ **BANNED** (winner uses mic + audio-file, both under the line). OUTPUT: canvas2d √Ч3 (272,271,259), three.js √Ч2, raw-WebGL √Ч2 вАФ none вЙ•4, canvas2d chosen (continues rebalancing off the JURY-flagged three.js glut). TECHNIQUE: FFT-spectral √Ч2, kids-CA √Ч2 вАФ none вЙ•4. VIBE: kids √Ч5 вЖТ **BANNED** (adult cycle avoids cleanly); cosmic √Ч3.
- All three briefs were adult / mic+audio-file / canvas2d вЖТ dodged both banned tags cleanly. The winner is also the most JURY-aligned (it literally *is* the "extend 259 вЖТ listens, remembers, rewrites over 10 min" ask).

**Orchestration**: spawned 3 Builder subagents in parallel (single message), folder-isolated (275/276/277 pre-allocated), each fully briefed with constraints + typography rules + Canvas2D + the exact `/api/audio/:id` fetch pattern + the exact GitHub README URL + no-git/no-shared-docs limits. All three returned demoable + README, each self-reporting tsc+eslint clean. I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (no three.js/WebGL/additive-blend вАФ 275's only "three" match was a code comment; no `use*` helpers; `"use client"` first line; correct GitHub README link; `as any` properly eslint-disabled in 277; no API route created), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** вЖТ exit 0, "вЬУ Compiled successfully", all three `вЧЛ Static` (275 5.51 kB ¬Ј 276 5.73 kB ¬Ј 277 6.62 kB) вЖТ all three genuinely **build-verified** вАФ then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only (exit 0, "вЬУ Compiled in 35.8s", `275-memory-loom` `вЧЛ Static` **5.51 kB**).

**Winner = `275-memory-loom`.** Reasoning: (1) **Bullseye of the JURY's #1 adult ask** вАФ it reuses 259's *exact* incommensurate-loop engine and adds the mic-listening capture, so it IS "fuse 259 + listen + remember + rewrite over 10 min," almost verbatim. (2) **Strongest love + directive alignment** вАФ by keeping the *raw audio*, the room is literally built from Karel's own piano sound, sitting dead-center on the loved 163/227/172/259 cluster and his standing "use the real recordings" directive (the other two abstract the sound into grains/symbols). (3) **Demo-reliable** вАФ no fragile pitch detection (277's monophonic-detection risk; 276 is also robust but more abstract); the D-dorian pad means it's never silent even before you play. (4) **Novel** вАФ first live-capture / self-listening Frippertronics architecture in the lab. 276 (first concatenative synthesis вАФ highest *pure* novelty) and 277 (symbolic *Voyager* partner) banked build-verified in IDEAS.md.

**What I built/shipped**:
- `src/app/dream/275-memory-loom/page.tsx` вАФ a self-listening Frippertronics room. A muted mic tap вЖТ `ScriptProcessor`(4096) вЖТ smoothed RMS вЖТ 8 s rolling **ring buffer**; a two-threshold onset/release detector marks phrase boundaries (4.5 s cap, 0.6 s floor) and on phrase-end slices the recent audio out of the ring, peak-normalizes, end-fades for loopability, and banks it. Up to **7 verbatim phrase loops**, each a looping `AudioBufferSourceNode` with consonant `playbackRate` transposition (octave/5th/4th/M3/unison), stereo pan, and an incommensurate gain-LFO (0.041вАУ0.127 Hz); a separate incommensurate playhead rate (0.131вАУ0.257) drives the visual sweep; full bank вЖТ **oldest memory decays out** (demo seeds first, then by capture time). A generative **movement state machine** every 60вАУ130 s random-walks the active set (3вАУ5 voices, 2.5 s in / 4.5 s out crossfades via `setTargetAtTime`), transpositions, density, lowpass cutoff (900вАУ4100 Hz), and reverb wet/dry. Signal chain: per-voice вЖТ shared lowpass вЖТ dry + procedural-IR convolution reverb wet вЖТ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вЖТ destination (never clips/silent). Tri-modal source: **mic** ¬Ј **file-drop** ¬Ј **Welcome Home track-id** вЖТ read-only `fetch('/api/audio/:id')` (JSON-`{url}`-or-raw-bytes) ¬Ј always-on **D-dorian** synth demo pad (non-pentatonic). Canvas2D **loom**: per-phrase lanes (waveform + incommensurate playhead + gain-brightness + warm/amber hue + `captured Nm ago` label), capture flash, live input RMS meter, HUD (elapsed / movement # / active-total voices / source). Full teardown (sources stopped, rAF cancelled, mic tracks stopped, `audioCtx.close()`). Typography rules followed.
- `src/app/dream/275-memory-loom/README.md` вАФ concept; what's novel (keeps raw audio, not features); 4 subsystems; signal-chain diagram; state-machine table; degradation table; named refs (Eno/Fripp + Oliveros); honest limits (deprecated `ScriptProcessor` main-thread capture, RMS-only onset, naive normalization, `playbackRate` couples pitch+duration, sources not monitored dry); next-cycle deepening (AudioWorklet + spectral-flux onset, pitch-preserving transposition, regenerative feedback-delay tape path, persistent/exportable memory, steerable movements).
- Banked both build-verified non-winners as seeds in IDEAS.md and `rm -rf`'d their folders (never committed, per orchestration safety): **`mosaic-listener`** (CataRT/MACataRT grain-corpus concatenative synthesis вАФ the lab's **first concatenative synthesis**, the strongest single novelty bank; queued for the next clean-slate adult cycle) and **`motif-memory`** (autocorrelation pitch-transcription вЖТ symbolic Markov/transformational re-performance, the Lewis *Voyager* / Rowe *Cypher* lineage вАФ most musically-literate, extends loved `256`). Appended RESEARCH ¬І287. Updated INDEX Newest. Rewrote MORNING.md.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First time the lab records YOU in real time and plays you back as the instrument.** Not a visualizer, not file playback вАФ a live self-listening loop. The instrument becomes made of your own sound.
2. **The most literal extension of loved 259 + Karel's "use his real recordings" directive** вАФ same incommensurate-loop engine, but it *listens* and *remembers*, and keeps the raw piano sound.
3. **Brings the self-listening-agent architecture (MACAT/CataRT) into the lab via its cheapest, most personal form** вАФ zero deps, zero latency, browser-native, where the 2026 GPU frontier can't reach.
4. **DEEP shipped the most JURY-aligned of three memory representations**, banking the lab's first concatenative-synthesis piece and a symbolic *Voyager* partner вАФ two more fresh techniques queued.

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 288: **kids build** (288 % 2 = 0). MUST be orchestrated. Ship banked **`274-kids-clay-clock`** (the West-African 2:3:4 + gankogui polyrhythm opener вАФ a brand-new kids SOUND, build-verified cycle 286) to keep diversifying the kids sound axis. Hold `273-kids-raga-peacock` вЙ•1 more kids cycle from `268`'s similar non-Western/cut-paper aesthetic.
- Cycle 289: **adult build** вАФ ship banked **`mosaic-listener`** (the lab's first concatenative synthesis вАФ newest technique, highest novelty), OR **DEEPEN 275** (pitch-preserving granular/phase-vocoder transposition, regenerative feedback-delay tape path, persistent/exportable/steerable memory вАФ its README lists the path; a loved-cluster piece worth 2вАУ3 cycles).

**Notes**:
- No API route / no `guard` needed: `275` only READS `/api/audio/:id` (existing read-only endpoint, the loved-`163` pattern вАФ no side effects, no secrets) + Web Audio + Canvas. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`).
